question: Retrieve cases where the patient's age is greater than 75 and the case has a reaction described as 'Fluid imbalance'. Also, find the age group these cases fall under. Return the case's primary ID, the reaction description, and the age group.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Fluid imbalance'}), (c)-[:FALLS_UNDER]->(a:AgeGroup) WHERE c.age > 75 RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, r.description AS reactionDescription, a.ageGroup AS ageGroup

question: Find users whose first name is 'Nik' and who have watched movies with the genre 'Adventure'. Return the titles of those movies.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WHERE u.firstName = 'Nik' AND g.name = 'Adventure' RETURN m.title

question: For each type of place, calculate the average number of visits made by persons with 'Healthy' healthstatus and the average visit duration (in seconds). Return the place type, average visit count, and average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Healthy'})-[:PERFORMS_VISIT]->(v:Visit)-[:LOCATED_AT]->(pl:Place) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH pl.type AS placeType, p, v.duration.seconds AS duration WITH placeType, COUNT(p) AS visitCount, AVG(duration) AS avgDuration RETURN placeType, AVG(toFloat(visitCount)) AS avgVisitCount, AVG(avgDuration) AS avgVisitDuration

question: Find persons whose visit duration at a 'Theater' exceeds the average visit duration across all places. Return their names, the theater's name, and their visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'Theater'}) WITH p, v, pl, avg(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDuration WHERE v.duration.seconds > avgDuration RETURN p.name AS PersonName, pl.name AS TheaterName, v.duration AS VisitDuration;

question: Find the first name and last name of users who have watched the movie 'Our Ladies' more than once, and also use the IP address '118.233.94.72'.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie), (u)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress) WHERE m.title = 'Our Ladies' AND w.watchCount > 1 AND ip.address = '118.233.94.72' RETURN u.firstName, u.lastName

question: Retrieve the names of all teams that participated in both 'Germany 2011' and 'France 2019' tournaments.
cypher:
MATCH (team:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tournament1:Tournament {name: 'Germany 2011'})
WITH team
MATCH (team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tournament2:Tournament {name: 'France 2019'})
RETURN team.name AS TeamName

question: Find cases reported by 'Foreign' reporters that resulted in 'Hospitalization - Initial or Prolonged' and involve a drug with primary substance 'ROPINIROLE HYDROCHLORIDE'. Return the case ID and the reporter's name.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(r:ReportSource {name: 'Foreign'})-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Hospitalization - Initial or Prolonged'})-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {primarySubstabce: 'ROPINIROLE HYDROCHLORIDE'}) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, r.name AS reporterName

question: What is the average age of cases that reported the reaction 'Rash', grouped by the name of the report source?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Rash'}), (c)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(rs:ReportSource) RETURN rs.name AS reportSourceName, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge

question: What is the average watch count for movies watched by male users compared to the average watch count for movies watched by female users?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH u.gender AS gender, w.watchCount AS watchCount WITH gender, AVG(watchCount) AS avgWatchCount RETURN gender, avgWatchCount

question: Find all cases where the drug 'Teduglutide', whose primary substance is 'TEDUGLUTIDE', is listed as a secondary suspect and the drug is administered via the 'Subcutaneous' route. Return the primary IDs of these cases.
cypher: MATCH (d:Drug {name: 'Teduglutide', primarySubstabce: 'TEDUGLUTIDE'})<-[r:IS_SECONDARY_SUSPECT]-(c:Case) WHERE r.route = 'Subcutaneous' RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId

question: What are the top 3 most frequent routes of administration for drugs that are primary suspects in cases reported by 'Consumer'?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(rs:ReportSource {name: 'Consumer'}), (c)-[rel:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug) RETURN rel.route AS route, COUNT(*) AS frequency ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 3

question: Find all pairs of users who both watched the movie 'Wrong Turn'. Return the first name and last name of each user pair.
cypher: MATCH (u1:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.title = 'Wrong Turn' WITH u1 MATCH (u2:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.title = 'Wrong Turn' AND u1 <> u2 RETURN u1.firstName AS User1FirstName, u1.lastName AS User1LastName, u2.firstName AS User2FirstName, u2.lastName AS User2LastName

question: Retrieve all cases where the drug 'ASG 22CE' is listed as a primary suspect and the reporter occupation is 'Pharmacist'. Return the case's primary ID, the drug's name, and the reporter's occupation.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case {reporterOccupation: 'Pharmacist'})-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'ASG 22CE'}) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, d.name AS drugName, c.reporterOccupation AS reporterOccupation

question: Find the names of persons who visited a place of type 'Hospital' and whose confirmedtime is after '2020-04-01 T 00:00:00 UTC'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {confirmedtime: datetime('2020-04-01T00:00:00 UTC')})-[:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'Hospital'}) RETURN p.name AS PersonName

question: What is the average balance of BankAccounts associated with FinancialInstitutes that have a website containing 'co' in their URL, and how many such BankAccounts exist?
cypher: MATCH (b:BankAccount)-[:FROM]->(f:FinancialInstitute) WHERE f.website CONTAINS 'co' WITH AVG(b.balance) AS averageBalance, COUNT(b) AS bankAccountCount RETURN averageBalance, bankAccountCount

question: For each tournament, find the team with the highest average score in matches. Return the tournament name, the team's name, and the team's average score.
cypher: MATCH (tour:Tournament)<-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]-(m:Match)<-[r:PLAYED_IN]-(t:Team) WHERE r.score IS NOT NULL WITH tour, t, AVG(r.score) AS avgScore ORDER BY tour.id, avgScore DESC WITH tour, COLLECT({team: t, avgScore: avgScore}) AS teamScores RETURN tour.name AS tournamentName, teamScores[0].team.name AS teamName, teamScores[0].avgScore AS averageScore

question: For each year, what is the average watch count for movies released in that year, and how many unique genres are associated with those movies?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WITH m.year AS year, w.watchCount AS watchCount, g WITH year, watchCount, COUNT(DISTINCT g.name) AS distinctGenreCount WITH year, AVG(watchCount) AS avgWatchCount, distinctGenreCount RETURN year, avgWatchCount, distinctGenreCount

question: Identify cases registered by 'BIOMARIN' where the event date is '2018-02-26'. Return the primary ID of those cases.
cypher: MATCH (m:Manufacturer {manufacturerName: 'BIOMARIN'})-[:REGISTERED]->(c:Case {eventDate: date('2018-02-26')}) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId

question: Retrieve the movie titles and years of movies watched by users from the 'US' whose first name is 'Pietro' and who use the IP address '55.195.36.214'.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie), (u)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress) WHERE u.country = 'US' AND u.firstName = 'Pietro' AND ip.address = '55.195.36.214' RETURN m.title AS MovieTitle, m.year AS MovieYear

question: For cases reported by 'Health Professional', what is the average age of patients who are prescribed drugs through therapy and what is the count of such cases, grouped by the name of the prescribed drug?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(rs:ReportSource {name: 'Health Professional'}), (c)-[:RECEIVED]->(t:Therapy)-[:PRESCRIBED]->(d:Drug) RETURN d.name AS drugName, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge, COUNT(c) AS caseCount

question: Find the IP addresses used by female users from 'US' who have watched a movie with the title 'Project Space 13'.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie), (u)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress) WHERE u.gender = 'Female' AND u.country = 'US' AND m.title = 'Project Space 13' RETURN ip.address

question: Find all 'Healthy' persons who visited places in 'Antwerp' and return the names of the persons and the types of places they visited.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Healthy'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region {name: 'Antwerp'}) RETURN p.name AS PersonName, pl.type AS PlaceType

question: Retrieve the email addresses of users who use the IP address '181.20.168.229' and have 'Female' as their gender.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress) WHERE ip.address = '181.20.168.229' AND u.gender = 'Female' RETURN u.email AS UserEmail

question: For each movie genre, what is the average year of movies in that genre, and how many movies in that genre were watched by users with a watch count greater than 1?
cypher: MATCH (g:Genre)<-[:HAS]-(m:Movie)<-[w:WATCHED]-(u:User) WHERE w.watchCount > 1 WITH g.name AS genre, m.year AS movieYear, m WITH genre, AVG(movieYear) AS avgYear, COUNT(m) AS moviesWatchedCount RETURN genre, avgYear, moviesWatchedCount

question: For each person whose health status is 'Healthy', find the average duration of their visits to places of type 'Restaurant'. Return the person's name and the average visit duration in seconds.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Healthy'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'Restaurant'}) WITH p, avg(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDuration RETURN p.name AS PersonName, avgDuration

question: What is the average age of cases that reported the reaction 'Inflammation', grouped by the gender of the patient?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Inflammation'}) WHERE c.age IS NOT NULL RETURN c.gender AS gender, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge

question: What is the average number of movies watched by users from each country, and what is the total number of users from each country who have watched at least one movie?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH u.country AS country, AVG(w.watchCount) AS averageWatchCount, COUNT(u) AS totalUsersWithAtLeastOneMovie RETURN country, averageWatchCount, totalUsersWithAtLeastOneMovie

question: For each genre, what is the average number of times a movie of that genre has been watched, considering only users who use the IP address '208.54.37.58'?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[r:USES]->(i:IpAddress) WHERE i.address = '208.54.37.58' WITH u MATCH (u)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) RETURN g.name AS genre, AVG(w.watchCount) AS averageWatchCount

question: Identify cases where the patient's age is 90 and the drug 'TOCILIZUMAB' is listed as a primary suspect. Return the report date and event date for these cases.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case {age: 90.0})-[r:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'TOCILIZUMAB'}) RETURN c.reportDate AS reportDate, c.eventDate AS eventDate

question: For each team that participated in the 'USA 2003' tournament, calculate the average number of goals scored per match. Return the team name and the average goals scored.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[r:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'USA 2003'}) WHERE r.score IS NOT NULL WITH t, COUNT(m) AS matchCount, SUM(r.score) AS totalGoals RETURN t.name AS teamName, toFloat(totalGoals)/matchCount AS avgGoalsPerMatch

question: What is the average watch count for movies watched by users grouped by their gender and state?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH u.gender AS gender, u.state AS state, w.watchCount AS watchCount RETURN gender, state, AVG(watchCount) AS averageWatchCount

question: Retrieve cases reported by 'Company Representative' where the patient's gender is 'M' and the drug prescribed in the therapy has 'CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE' as its primary substance.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(rs:ReportSource {name: 'Company Representative'}) MATCH (c)-[:RECEIVED]->(t:Therapy)-[:PRESCRIBED]->(d:Drug {primarySubstabce: 'CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE'}) WHERE c.gender = 'M' RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId

question: For each team that participated in the 'Sweden 1995' tournament, compute the average number of goals scored by its players and the total number of players in the team. Return the team's name, average goals per player, and total player count.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'Sweden 1995'}) MATCH (p:Person)-[:REPRESENTS]->(t)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match) OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m) WITH t, p, COUNT(sg) AS goalsPerPlayer WITH t, AVG(goalsPerPlayer) AS avgGoalsPerPlayer, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS totalPlayers RETURN t.name AS teamName, avgGoalsPerPlayer, totalPlayers

question: Find the IP addresses used by female users who have watched a movie of the 'Horror' genre more than once.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress), (u)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WHERE u.gender = 'Female' AND g.name = 'Horror' AND w.watchCount > 1 RETURN ip.address AS IpAddress

question: For each person who played in a match, find the total number of goals they scored and the average number of minutes they played per match. Return the person's name, total goals scored, and average minutes played.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[r:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match) WHERE r.minuteOn IS NOT NULL WITH p, COUNT(m) AS matchCount, SUM(toInt(r.minuteOn)) AS totalMinutesPlayed OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m2:Match) WITH p, matchCount, totalMinutesPlayed, COUNT(sg) AS totalGoalsScored RETURN p.name AS playerName, totalGoalsScored, CASE WHEN matchCount = 0 THEN 0 ELSE toFloat(totalMinutesPlayed) / matchCount END AS avgMinutesPlayed;

question: Find cases registered by 'AURINIA PHARMACEUTICALS' where the event date is in September 2020. Return the case's primary ID and the event date.
cypher: MATCH (m:Manufacturer {manufacturerName: 'AURINIA PHARMACEUTICALS'})-[:REGISTERED]->(c:Case) WHERE c.eventDate = date('2020-09-21') RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, c.eventDate AS eventDate

question: Retrieve all cases that are associated with the 'Child' age group and where the event date occurred in April 2021. Return the primary IDs of these cases.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:FALLS_UNDER]->(a:AgeGroup {ageGroup: 'Child'}) WHERE c.eventDate.year = 2021 AND c.eventDate.month = 4 RETURN c.primaryid AS CaseID

question: What is the average number of movies watched by users with a specific gender, and what is the total number of distinct IP addresses used by users of that gender?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie), (u)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress) WITH u.gender AS gender, u, m, ip WITH gender, u, COUNT(m) AS moviesWatchedPerUser, COLLECT(DISTINCT ip.address) AS distinctIps WITH gender, AVG(moviesWatchedPerUser) AS averageMoviesWatched, SIZE(distinctIps) AS totalDistinctIpsUsed RETURN gender, averageMoviesWatched, totalDistinctIpsUsed

question: Retrieve the names of persons who visited a 'Bar' before being confirmed as 'Sick'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'Bar'}) WHERE p.confirmedtime IS NOT NULL AND v.starttime < p.confirmedtime RETURN p.name AS PersonName

question: Find the average 'watchCount' for movies watched by female users from 'New York'.
cypher: MATCH (u:User {gender: 'Female', state: 'New York'})-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH u, m, u-[w:WATCHED]->m AS watchedRelationship RETURN avg(w.watchCount) AS AverageWatchCount

question: For each region, calculate the number of persons with 'Sick' health status who visited places in that region and the average duration in seconds of their visits. Return the region name, the count of 'Sick' persons, and the average visit duration.
cypher:
MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)
MATCH (pl)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region)
WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL
WITH r.name AS region, v.duration.seconds AS duration
WITH region, COUNT(duration) AS sickPersonCount, AVG(duration) AS avgDuration
RETURN region, sickPersonCount, avgDuration

question: For each continent, determine the average visit duration in seconds for visits originating from persons with 'Sick' health status. Return the continent name and the average duration, ordering by continent name.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place) MATCH (pl)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Continent) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH c.name AS continentName, v.duration.seconds AS visitDuration RETURN continentName, AVG(visitDuration) AS averageVisitDuration ORDER BY continentName

question: Calculate the average amount of MoneyTransfers associated with each PhoneNumber provider.
cypher: MATCH (mt:MoneyTransfer)-[:WITH]->(pn:PhoneNumber) WITH pn.provider AS provider, AVG(mt.amount) AS averageAmount RETURN provider, averageAmount

question: For each manufacturer, what is the total number of cases registered and the average age of patients, considering only cases where the reaction description is 'Confusional state'?
cypher: MATCH (m:Manufacturer)-[:REGISTERED]->(c:Case)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Confusional state'}) RETURN m.manufacturerName AS manufacturer, COUNT(c) AS totalCases, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge;

question: Find all users who watched both the movie 'Remember Me' and any movie released in 2021. Return the first name and last name of those users.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m1:Movie {title: 'Remember Me'}) WITH u MATCH (u)-[:WATCHED]->(m2:Movie {year: 2021}) RETURN DISTINCT u.firstName AS FirstName, u.lastName AS LastName

question: For each continent, calculate the average number of visits performed by persons and the average duration (in seconds) of those visits. Return the continent name, the average number of visits, and the average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:PERFORMS_VISIT]->(v:Visit)-[:LOCATED_AT]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(cont:Continent) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH cont.name AS continentName, p, v  WITH continentName, p, COUNT(v) AS visitCount, AVG(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDurationPerVisit WITH continentName, AVG(visitCount) AS avgVisitCount, AVG(avgDurationPerVisit) AS avgDuration  RETURN continentName, avgVisitCount, avgDuration

question: For each team, calculate the total number of matches they played and the average score in those matches. Return the team's name, total matches played, and average score.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[r:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match) WHERE r.score IS NOT NULL WITH t, COUNT(m) AS totalMatches, SUM(r.score) AS totalScore RETURN t.name AS teamName, totalMatches, CASE WHEN totalMatches > 0 THEN toFloat(totalScore) / totalMatches ELSE 0 END AS averageScore

question: For the 'Germany 2011' tournament, what is the average number of goals scored per match, and what is the total number of matches played?
cypher:
MATCH (tour:Tournament {name: 'Germany 2011'})<-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]-(m:Match)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m)
WITH tour, m, COUNT(sg) AS goals
WITH tour, COUNT(m) AS totalMatches, SUM(goals) AS totalGoals
RETURN tour.name AS tournamentName, toFloat(totalGoals) / totalMatches AS avgGoalsPerMatch, totalMatches

question: What are the titles of movies that have the genre 'Comedy' and were watched by users with the country 'US'? Return the movie titles.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WHERE u.country = 'US' AND g.name = 'Comedy' RETURN m.title

question: Find all persons who visited a 'Grocery shop' and a 'Bar' on the same day. Return the names of these persons and the count of such days.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v1:VISITS]->(pl1:Place {type: 'Grocery shop'}) WITH p, date(v1.starttime) AS visitDate MATCH (p)-[v2:VISITS]->(pl2:Place {type: 'Bar'}) WHERE date(v2.starttime) = visitDate RETURN p.name AS PersonName, count(DISTINCT visitDate) AS NumberOfDays

question: Find the names of all persons whose 'addresslocation' is within a 1km radius of the 'homelocation' of 'Place nr 80', and who visited that place. Return the person's name and the place's name.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {name: 'Place nr 80'}) WHERE distance(p.addresslocation, point({latitude: 51.20901328, longitude: 4.396504119})) <= 1000 RETURN p.name AS PersonName, pl.name AS PlaceName;

question: List the first name and last name of users who watched the movie 'Spirit Untamed' and use the IP address '215.150.219.100'.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie), (u)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress) WHERE m.title = 'Spirit Untamed' AND ip.address = '215.150.219.100' RETURN u.firstName, u.lastName

question: For each person, determine the total number of goals they scored and the average number of minutes they played in each match where the 'minuteOn' property is available. Return the person's name, total goals scored, and average minutes played.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match) WITH p, COUNT(sg) AS totalGoals OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[pi:PLAYED_IN]->(m) WHERE pi.minuteOn IS NOT NULL WITH p, totalGoals, AVG(toFloat(replace(pi.minuteOn, '''', ''))) AS avgMinutesPlayed RETURN p.name AS personName, totalGoals, avgMinutesPlayed

question: Retrieve the names of all genres that are associated with movies watched by users from the 'US'.
cypher: MATCH (u:User {country: 'US'})-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) RETURN DISTINCT g.name

question: For each type of place, calculate the average duration (in seconds) of visits performed by persons with a 'Sick' health status. Return the place type and the average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH pl.type AS placeType, AVG(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDuration RETURN placeType, avgDuration

question: Find the names of all teams that participated in the 'Sweden 1995' tournament and the names of the players who scored goals for those teams in any match of that tournament.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'Sweden 1995'}), (t)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour), (p:Person)-[:SCORED_GOAL]->(m), (p)-[:REPRESENTS]->(t) RETURN DISTINCT t.name AS teamName, p.name AS playerName

question: Identify all squads that participated in the 'USA 2003' tournament. For each squad, find the coaches associated with that squad. Return the squad ID and the names of the coaches.
cypher: MATCH (s:Squad)-[:FOR]->(t:Tournament {name: 'USA 2003'}) MATCH (p:Person)-[:COACH_FOR]->(s) RETURN s.id AS squadId, collect(p.name) AS coachNames

question: For each squad, determine the total number of players in the squad and the average number of matches played by each player. Return the squad ID, total players, and average matches played per player.
cypher:
MATCH (s:Squad)<-[:IN_SQUAD]-(p:Person)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match)
WITH s, p, COUNT(m) AS matchesPlayed
WITH s, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS totalPlayers, AVG(matchesPlayed) AS avgMatchesPerPlayer
RETURN s.id AS squadId, totalPlayers, avgMatchesPerPlayer

question: For each tournament, calculate the number of teams that participated and the average number of players in each squad that participated in the tournament. Return the tournament name, number of teams, and average squad size.
cypher: MATCH (tour:Tournament)<-[:FOR]-(s:Squad)<-[:NAMED]-(t:Team) WITH tour, s, COUNT(t) AS totalTeams MATCH (s)<-[:IN_SQUAD]-(p:Person) WITH tour, totalTeams, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS squadSize RETURN tour.name AS tournamentName, totalTeams, AVG(squadSize) AS avgSquadSize

question: For each continent, determine the percentage of visits made by persons with 'Sick' healthstatus. Return the continent name and the percentage of visits made by 'Sick' persons.
cypher:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Continent)
WITH c.name AS continent, COUNT(CASE WHEN p.healthstatus = 'Sick' THEN 1 ELSE null END) AS sickVisits, COUNT(*) AS totalVisits
RETURN continent, 100.0 * sickVisits / totalVisits AS sickVisitPercentage

question: What is the average watchCount for movies watched by users from each country, and what is the total number of users from each country?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH u.country AS country, AVG(w.watchCount) AS avgWatchCount, COUNT(u) AS userCount RETURN country, avgWatchCount, userCount

question: For each player, calculate the number of tournaments they participated in and the average number of matches they played per tournament. Return the player's name, the number of tournaments, and the average matches per tournament.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour:Tournament) WITH p, tour, COUNT(m) AS matchesPerTournament WITH p, COUNT(DISTINCT tour) AS numTournaments, AVG(matchesPerTournament) AS avgMatchesPerTournament RETURN p.name AS playerName, numTournaments, avgMatchesPerTournament

question: What is the average amount of money transferred in transactions that used phone numbers from 'B Tee', and what is the maximum amount transferred in those same transactions?
cypher: MATCH (mt:MoneyTransfer)-[:WITH]->(pn:PhoneNumber {provider: 'B Tee'}) RETURN avg(mt.amount) AS AverageTransferAmount, max(mt.amount) AS MaximumTransferAmount

question: Find users from the 'US' who have watched movies with the genre 'Fantasy' and return their first name, last name, and the titles of the movies they watched.
cypher: MATCH (u:User {country: 'US'})-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre {name: 'Fantasy'}) RETURN u.firstName AS FirstName, u.lastName AS LastName, m.title AS MovieTitle

question: Find the first name and last name of users who have watched movies with a 'watchCount' greater than 1, and who also use the IP address '43.252.141.52'.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie), (u)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress) WHERE w.watchCount > 1 AND ip.address = '43.252.141.52' RETURN u.firstName, u.lastName

question: For each person who scored a goal, find the average number of goals they scored per match and the total number of matches they played in. Return the person's name, average goals per match, and total matches played, only if they played in more than 0 matches.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match) WITH p, COUNT(sg) AS totalGoals, COLLECT(DISTINCT m) AS matchesPlayed WITH p, totalGoals, SIZE(matchesPlayed) AS totalMatches WHERE totalMatches > 0 RETURN p.name AS playerName, toFloat(totalGoals) / totalMatches AS avgGoalsPerMatch, totalMatches;

question: Find all players who scored goals in matches played in the 'China 2007' tournament. Return the player's name, the match ID, and the minute the goal was scored.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(t:Tournament {name: 'China 2007'}) RETURN p.name AS playerName, m.id AS matchId, sg.minute AS goalMinute

question: What is the average age of cases that reported the reaction 'Laryngeal cancer', grouped by the name of the report source?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Laryngeal cancer'}), (c)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(rs:ReportSource) RETURN rs.name AS reportSourceName, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge

question: Find all players who scored goals in matches that took place in the 'China 2007' tournament. Return the player's name and the match date.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(t:Tournament {name: 'China 2007'}) RETURN p.name AS playerName, m.date AS matchDate

question: For each player who played in a match with a 'Group Matches' stage, calculate the total number of goals they scored and the average number of minutes they played. Return the player's name, total goals scored, and average minutes played.
cypher:
MATCH (p:Person)-[r:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match {stage: 'Group Matches'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m)
WITH p, r, COUNT(sg) AS totalGoalsScored, toInteger(r.minuteOn) AS minuteOn
WITH p, SUM(totalGoalsScored) AS totalGoals, AVG(minuteOn) AS avgMinutesPlayed
RETURN p.name AS playerName, totalGoals, avgMinutesPlayed

question: For each tournament, find the average age of the players who scored goals in matches. Return the tournament name and the average age.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour:Tournament) WHERE p.dob IS NOT NULL WITH tour, p, m.date.year AS matchYear, p.dob AS playerDob WITH tour, p, matchYear - playerDob.year AS playerAge WITH tour, AVG(playerAge) AS avgAge RETURN tour.name AS tournamentName, avgAge

question: For each tournament, list the tournament name and the number of players who scored goals in matches within that tournament.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(t:Tournament) WITH t.name AS tournamentName, p WITH tournamentName, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS numberOfScorers RETURN tournamentName, numberOfScorers

question: For each squad that participated in the 'China 2007' tournament, find the names of the coaches and the number of players in that squad.
cypher: MATCH (s:Squad)-[:FOR]->(t:Tournament {name: 'China 2007'}), (p:Person)-[:COACH_FOR]->(s) WITH s, p MATCH (player:Person)-[:IN_SQUAD]->(s) WITH s, p, count(player) AS playerCount RETURN p.name AS coachName, s.id AS squadId, playerCount

question: For each state, what is the average number of distinct genres of movies watched by users from that state?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WITH u.state AS state, u, COLLECT(DISTINCT g.name) AS genresPerUser RETURN state, AVG(SIZE(genresPerUser)) AS averageDistinctGenres

question: For each team that participated in the 'China 2007' tournament, find the player who scored the most goals in any single match they played in during that tournament. Return the team's name, the player's name, and the number of goals scored.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'China 2007'}), (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match), (p)-[:REPRESENTS]->(t), (m)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour) WITH t, p, COUNT(sg) AS goals ORDER BY goals DESC WITH t, COLLECT({player: p.name, goals: goals}) AS playerGoals UNWIND playerGoals AS pg WITH t, pg.player AS playerName, pg.goals AS goals RETURN t.name AS teamName, playerName, goals LIMIT 1

question: For each movie genre, what is the average number of times movies of that genre are watched, considering only users who have watched more than 5 movies in total?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH u, COUNT(m) AS totalMoviesWatched WHERE totalMoviesWatched > 5 MATCH (u)-[w:WATCHED]->(m)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WITH g.name AS genre, w.watchCount AS watchCount, COUNT(m) AS totalMoviesPerGenre WITH genre, AVG(watchCount) AS averageWatchCountPerGenre RETURN genre, averageWatchCountPerGenre

question: Retrieve the names of all players who scored goals in matches that took place on '2019-06-12'. Also, find the names of the tournaments in which these matches were played.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match {date: date('2019-06-12')})-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(t:Tournament) RETURN p.name AS playerName, t.name AS tournamentName

question: Find the total number of cases where the primary suspect drug is 'rivaroxaban' and group these cases by the reporter's occupation. Return the count of cases for each reporter occupation.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'rivaroxaban'}) WITH c.reporterOccupation AS reporterOccupation, c AS case RETURN reporterOccupation, COUNT(case) AS totalCases

question: Retrieve cases where the reaction is 'Chronic inflammatory demyelinating polyradiculoneuropathy' and the drug involved as a primary suspect is 'DAPTOMYCIN'. Return the primary ID of the case and the name of the drug.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Chronic inflammatory demyelinating polyradiculoneuropathy'}) MATCH (c)-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'DAPTOMYCIN'}) RETURN c.primaryid AS CaseID, d.name AS DrugName

question: For each tournament, determine the team with the highest average score in matches played during that tournament. Return the tournament name, the team name, and the average score.
cypher:
MATCH (t:Team)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour:Tournament)
WITH tour, t, AVG(toFloat(m.stage)) AS avgScore
ORDER BY tour.name, avgScore DESC
WITH tour, COLLECT({team: t, avgScore: avgScore}) AS teamScores
RETURN tour.name AS tournamentName, teamScores[0].team.name AS teamName, teamScores[0].avgScore AS averageScore

question: For each country, calculate the average number of visits per person and the average duration (in seconds) of those visits. Return the country name, average visits per person, and average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country) WITH c, p, pl MATCH (p)-[:VISITS]->(pl)-[:LOCATED_AT]->(v:Visit) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH c.name AS countryName, p, COUNT(v) AS visitCount, AVG(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDurationPerVisit WITH countryName, AVG(visitCount) AS avgVisitsPerPerson, AVG(avgDurationPerVisit) AS avgDurationPerPerson RETURN countryName, avgVisitsPerPerson, avgDurationPerPerson

question: For each type of place, find the average duration (in seconds) of visits made by 'Sick' persons before their confirmed time. Return the place type and the average pre-confirmed visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place) WHERE v.starttime < p.confirmedtime AND v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH pl.type AS placeType, v.duration.seconds AS visitDuration RETURN placeType, AVG(visitDuration) AS avgPreConfirmedVisitDuration

question: Find users whose first name starts with 'W' and who have watched movies that belong to the 'Thriller' genre. Return their user ID, first name, and last name.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WHERE u.firstName STARTS WITH 'W' AND g.name = 'Thriller' RETURN u.userId, u.firstName, u.lastName

question: Find all persons whose residential location is within a 1km radius of 'Place nr 93' and return their names along with the name of the place.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person), (pl:Place {name: 'Place nr 93'}) WHERE distance(p.addresslocation, pl.homelocation) < 1000 RETURN p.name AS PersonName, pl.name AS PlaceName

question: Find cases where the patient is an 'Adult' and has been prescribed 'Electrolyte A'. Return the case's primary ID and the start year of the prescription.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:FALLS_UNDER]->(a:AgeGroup {ageGroup: 'Adult'}) MATCH (c)-[:RECEIVED]->(t:Therapy)-[p:PRESCRIBED]->(d:Drug {name: 'Electrolyte A'}) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, p.startYear AS startYear

question: What are the addresses of IpAddress that are used by users with the first name 'Amalita' and last name 'Kalb'?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress) WHERE u.firstName = 'Amalita' AND u.lastName = 'Kalb' RETURN ip.address

question: Find all users who watched movies released in 2021 and also use the IP address '178.226.241.163'. Return their first and last names.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie {year: 2021}), (u)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress {address: '178.226.241.163'}) RETURN u.firstName, u.lastName

question: For the 'USA 1999' tournament, determine the average number of players per squad and the total number of matches played. Return the average players per squad and total matches.
cypher:
MATCH (tour:Tournament {name: 'USA 1999'})<-[:FOR]-(s:Squad)<-[:IN_SQUAD]-(p:Person)
WITH tour, s, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS playerCount
WITH tour, AVG(playerCount) AS avgPlayersPerSquad
MATCH (m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour)
WITH tour, avgPlayersPerSquad, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS totalMatches
RETURN avgPlayersPerSquad, totalMatches

question: What is the average number of movies watched by male and female users separately, and what is the difference between these averages?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH u.gender AS gender, AVG(w.watchCount) AS averageWatchCount RETURN gender, averageWatchCount, (CASE WHEN gender = 'Male' THEN averageWatchCount ELSE 0 END) - (CASE WHEN gender = 'Female' THEN averageWatchCount ELSE 0 END) AS difference

question: For each state, what is the average balance of unsecured loans held by flagged account holders residing in that state?
cypher: MATCH (f:Flagged)-[:HAS_ADDRESS]->(a:Address)-[:HAS_UNSECUREDLOAN]->(ul:UnsecuredLoan) WITH a.state AS State, ul.balance AS LoanBalance RETURN State, avg(LoanBalance) AS AverageLoanBalance

question: For each person, find the total number of matches they played in and the average number of goals they scored per match where they scored at least one goal. Return the person's name, total matches played, and average goals per match.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[r:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match) WITH p, COUNT(m) AS totalMatches OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m2:Match) WITH p, totalMatches, COUNT(sg) AS totalGoals WHERE totalGoals > 0 RETURN p.name AS personName, totalMatches, toFloat(totalGoals) / totalMatches AS averageGoalsPerMatch

question: Find the names of all players who are in a squad that is participating in the 'China 2007' tournament, and also represent the 'Ecuador' team.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:IN_SQUAD]->(s:Squad)-[:FOR]->(t:Tournament {name: 'China 2007'}), (p)-[:REPRESENTS]->(team:Team {name: 'Ecuador'}) RETURN p.name AS playerName

question: What are the distinct reporter occupations associated with cases that resulted in 'Hospitalization - Initial or Prolonged', and how many cases are associated with each occupation?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Hospitalization - Initial or Prolonged'}), (c)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(r:ReportSource) RETURN r.name AS reporterOccupation, COUNT(c) AS totalCases

question: For each continent, determine the average duration in seconds of visits to each type of place. Return the continent name, the place type, and the average visit duration.
cypher:
MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)
MATCH (pl)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(cont:Continent)
WITH cont.name AS continent, pl.type AS placeType, AVG(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDuration
RETURN continent, placeType, avgDuration

question: For each type of place, determine the average duration (in seconds) of visits made by persons with 'Sick' health status. Return the place type and the average visit duration.
cypher:
MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)
WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL
WITH pl.type AS placeType, v.duration.seconds AS duration
RETURN placeType, AVG(duration) AS averageDuration

question: Retrieve the names of all persons who visited a place in 'Antwerp' and whose health status is 'Sick'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[:VISITS]->(v:Visit)-[:LOCATED_AT]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region {name: 'Antwerp'}) RETURN p.name AS PersonName

question: Find the names of all persons whose residential location is within 5km of 'Place nr 83' and who have visited it, along with the distance between their address and the place's home location.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {name: 'Place nr 83'}) WHERE distance(p.addresslocation, pl.homelocation) <= 5000 RETURN p.name AS PersonName, distance(p.addresslocation, pl.homelocation) AS DistanceInMeters;

question: Find cases where the reaction is 'Mean cell haemoglobin increased' and the case falls under the 'Adolescent' age group. Return the primary IDs of these cases.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Mean cell haemoglobin increased'}), (c)-[:FALLS_UNDER]->(a:AgeGroup {ageGroup: 'Adolescent'}) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId

question: For each team that participated in the 'China 2007' tournament, determine the average number of goals scored by their players in each match. Return the team name and average goals scored per match.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'China 2007'}) MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match) WHERE (t)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m) WITH t, COUNT(sg) AS totalGoals, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS totalMatches RETURN t.name AS teamName, CASE WHEN totalMatches > 0 THEN toFloat(totalGoals) / totalMatches ELSE 0 END AS avgGoalsPerMatch

question: Find all 'Sick' persons who visited a place of type 'School' before their confirmed time, and return their names, the school's name, and the difference in days between the confirmation time and the visit start time.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'School'}) WHERE p.confirmedtime > v.starttime RETURN p.name AS PersonName, pl.name AS SchoolName, duration.between(v.starttime, p.confirmedtime).days AS DaysDifference

question: For each tournament, retrieve the tournament name and list the players who have coached a squad participating in that tournament, along with the squad ID.
cypher: MATCH (tournament:Tournament)<-[:FOR]-(squad:Squad)<-[:COACH_FOR]-(player:Person) RETURN tournament.name AS TournamentName, collect({playerName: player.name, squadId: squad.id}) AS Coaches

question: Find the names of all players who represent the team 'Japan' and have scored goals in matches. Return the player's name and the IDs of the matches in which they scored.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:REPRESENTS]->(team:Team {name: 'Japan'}), (p)-[:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match) RETURN p.name AS playerName, m.id AS matchId

question: What are the titles of movies that have the genre 'Thriller' and were watched by users whose state is 'Washington'?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WHERE g.name = 'Thriller' AND u.state = 'Washington' RETURN m.title

question: Find the users who watched movies released in 2021 and also use the IP address '12.106.164.42'. Return the first name and last name of these users.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.year = 2021 WITH u MATCH (u)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress) WHERE ip.address = '12.106.164.42' RETURN u.firstName, u.lastName

question: What is the average number of movies watched by users using a specific IP address, and what is the total number of distinct users using that IP address?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie), (u)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress) WITH ip.address AS ipAddress, u, w.watchCount AS watchCount RETURN ipAddress, AVG(watchCount) AS averageWatchCount, COUNT(DISTINCT u) AS totalUsers

question: What is the average age of cases reported by 'Consumer' that resulted in 'Death', grouped by the route of administration of the primary suspect drug, and the count of cases for each route?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(r:ReportSource {name: 'Consumer'}), (c)-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Death'}), (c)-[rel:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug) RETURN rel.route AS route, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge, COUNT(c) AS totalCases

question: For each tournament, find the average age of players who scored goals in matches within that tournament. Return the tournament name and the average player age.
cypher: MATCH (tour:Tournament)<-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]-(m:Match)<-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]-(p:Person) WHERE p.dob IS NOT NULL WITH tour, p, m.date AS matchDate, p.dob AS playerDOB WITH tour, p, date(matchDate).year - date(playerDOB).year AS playerAge WITH tour, AVG(playerAge) AS avgPlayerAge RETURN tour.name AS tournamentName, avgPlayerAge

question: Find all matches where Lydia Ankrah played, and retrieve the match date and stage. Also, find the type of participation for Lydia Ankrah in each match.
cypher: MATCH (person:Person {name: 'Lydia Ankrah'})-[playedIn:PLAYED_IN]->(match:Match) RETURN match.date AS matchDate, match.stage AS matchStage, playedIn.type AS participationType

question: Find all cases where the drug 'METRONIDAZOLE' is listed as a primary suspect and the case resulted in 'Disability'. Return the primary IDs of these cases.
cypher: MATCH (d:Drug {name: 'METRONIDAZOLE'})<-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]-(c:Case)-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Disability'}) RETURN c.primaryid AS CaseID

question: For the team 'Ghana', list all the matches they played in, including the stage of the match and the date, and also list the names of the players who played in those matches.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team {name: 'Ghana'})-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match) , (p:Person)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m) RETURN m.id AS matchId, m.stage AS matchStage, m.date AS matchDate, p.name AS playerName

question: Retrieve the names of 'Healthy' persons who visited places also visited by 'Sick' persons, and return the names of those places.
cypher: MATCH (healthy:Person {healthstatus: 'Healthy'})-[:VISITS]->(place:Place) MATCH (sick:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[:VISITS]->(place) RETURN DISTINCT healthy.name AS healthyPersonName, place.name AS visitedPlace

question: Retrieve the names of all teams that participated in the 'France 2019' tournament, and for each team, count the number of players in their squad.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'France 2019'}), (t)-[:NAMED]->(s:Squad)<-[:IN_SQUAD]-(p:Person) WITH t, COUNT(p) AS playerCount RETURN t.name AS teamName, playerCount

question: Find cases where 'GENOTROPIN' is a primary suspect drug with 'Unknown' route of administration and the case was reported by someone other than 'Lawyer'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[r:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'GENOTROPIN'}) WHERE r.route = 'Unknown' AND c.reporterOccupation <> 'Lawyer' RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, d.name AS drugName, r.route AS route, c.reporterOccupation AS reporterOccupation

question: Retrieve the names of all players who represent the team 'Spain' and played in matches during the 'Germany 2011' tournament. Also, return the match ID.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:REPRESENTS]->(t:Team {name: 'Spain'}), (p)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'Germany 2011'}) RETURN p.name AS playerName, m.id AS matchId

question: What is the total number of movies watched by users with the first name 'Evey', and what is the average watch count for those movies?
cypher: MATCH (u:User {firstName: 'Evey'})-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH COUNT(m) AS totalMoviesWatched, AVG(w.watchCount) AS avgWatchCount RETURN totalMoviesWatched, avgWatchCount

question: For each movie genre, what is the average watchCount for movies of that genre, considering only users who have watched more than 5 movies?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WITH u, COUNT(m) AS totalMoviesWatched WHERE totalMoviesWatched > 5 WITH u MATCH (u)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) RETURN g.name AS genre, AVG(w.watchCount) AS averageWatchCount

question: For each continent, find the average visit duration in seconds for visits to 'Restaurant' type places, grouped by the health status of the visitor. Return the continent name, health status, and average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'Restaurant'}) MATCH (pl)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Continent) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH c.name AS continent, p.healthstatus AS healthStatus, v.duration.seconds AS visitDuration RETURN continent, healthStatus, AVG(visitDuration) AS avgDuration ORDER BY continent, healthStatus

question: For the 'USA 1999' tournament, find the average number of goals scored per match. Return the tournament name and the average goals per match.
cypher: MATCH (t:Tournament {name: 'USA 1999'})<-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]-(m:Match)<-[r:SCORED_GOAL]-(:Person) WITH t, m, COUNT(r) AS goalsPerMatch WITH t, AVG(goalsPerMatch) AS avgGoalsPerMatch RETURN t.name AS tournamentName, avgGoalsPerMatch

question: Find cases where 'ALBUTEROL\IPRATROPIUM' is a primary suspect, and the case is reported by a 'Physician'. Return the case's primary ID and the drug's name.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {primarySubstabce: 'ALBUTEROL\IPRATROPIUM'}) MATCH (c)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(r:ReportSource {name: 'Physician'}) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, d.name AS drugName

question: Find all cases where a drug with primary substance 'TADALAFIL' is a primary suspect with 'Oral' route, and the case was reported by a 'Pharmacist'. Return the case's primary ID, the drug's name, and the reporter's occupation.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[r:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {primarySubstabce: 'TADALAFIL'}) WHERE r.route = 'Oral' WITH c, d MATCH (c)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(rp:ReportSource {name: 'Pharmacist'}) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, d.name AS drugName, rp.name AS reporterOccupation

question: What is the average age of cases reported by 'Health Professional' that resulted in 'Congenital Anomaly', grouped by the gender of the case?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(rs:ReportSource {name: 'Health Professional'}), (c)-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Congenital Anomaly'}) WHERE rs.name = 'Health Professional' AND o.outcome = 'Congenital Anomaly' RETURN c.gender AS gender, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge

question: For each state, what is the average watch count of movies watched by users and the total number of users in that state?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH u.state AS State, AVG(w.watchCount) AS AverageWatchCount, u RETURN State, AverageWatchCount, COUNT(DISTINCT u) AS UserCount

question: What is the average balance of BankAccounts that are associated with FinancialInstitutes whose name starts with 'Considine'?
cypher: MATCH (fi:FinancialInstitute)<-[:FROM]-(ba:BankAccount) WHERE fi.name STARTS WITH 'Considine' RETURN avg(ba.balance) AS AverageBalance

question: For cases where the outcome was 'Death', what is the average age across different reporter occupations, and what is the total number of such cases for each occupation?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Death'}) WITH c.reporterOccupation AS occupation, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge, COUNT(c) AS totalCases RETURN occupation, averageAge, totalCases

question: For cases that resulted in 'Hospitalization - Initial or Prolonged', what are the top 3 most frequent reporter occupations, along with the count of cases for each occupation?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Hospitalization - Initial or Prolonged'}) RETURN c.reporterOccupation AS reporterOccupation, COUNT(c) AS caseCount ORDER BY caseCount DESC LIMIT 3

question: For each health status, find the average number of visits to each place type and the average duration of those visits in seconds. Return the health status, place type, average visit count, and average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:VISITS]->(pl:Place) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH p.healthstatus AS healthStatus, pl.type AS placeType, p, v WITH healthStatus, placeType, COUNT(v) AS visitCount, AVG(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDurationPerVisit WITH healthStatus, placeType, AVG(visitCount) AS avgVisits, AVG(avgDurationPerVisit) AS avgDuration RETURN healthStatus, placeType, avgVisits, avgDuration

question: For each genre, what is the average watch count of movies in that genre, and what is the total number of users who have watched movies in that genre?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WITH g.name AS genre, AVG(w.watchCount) AS avgWatchCount, COUNT(DISTINCT u) AS userCount WHERE w.watchCount IS NOT NULL RETURN genre, avgWatchCount, userCount

question: For each tournament, find the team with the highest average 'score' in the 'PLAYED_IN' relationship. Return the tournament name, the team name, and the average score.
cypher:
MATCH (t:Team)-[r:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour:Tournament)
WITH tour, t, AVG(toInt(r.score)) AS avgScore
ORDER BY tour.name, avgScore DESC
WITH tour, COLLECT({team: t, avgScore: avgScore}) AS teamScores
RETURN tour.name AS tournamentName, teamScores[0].team.name AS teamName, teamScores[0].avgScore AS averageScore

question: What are the first names and last names of users who have watched a movie released in 2021 and use an IP address that starts with '163.107'?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie {year: 2021}) MATCH (u)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress) WHERE ip.address STARTS WITH '163.107' RETURN u.firstName, u.lastName

question: For each provider of phone numbers, what is the average amount of money transferred using those phone numbers?
cypher: MATCH (mt:MoneyTransfer)-[:WITH]->(pn:PhoneNumber) RETURN pn.provider, avg(mt.amount) AS AverageTransferAmount

question: For each match in the 'USA 1999' tournament, find the teams that played in that match. Also, find the players who scored in those matches and return their names, the team they represent, and the date of the match.
cypher: MATCH (m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(t:Tournament {name: 'USA 1999'}), (team:Team)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m), (p:Person)-[:SCORED_GOAL]->(m), (p)-[:REPRESENTS]->(team) RETURN p.name AS playerName, team.name AS teamName, m.date AS matchDate

question: What is the average age of cases associated with the reaction 'Tumour marker decreased', grouped by the reporter's occupation?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Tumour marker decreased'}) RETURN c.reporterOccupation AS reporterOccupation, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge

question: What is the average number of movies watched by users from each country, and what is the total number of users in each country?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH u.country AS country, u, COUNT(m) AS moviesWatchedPerUser WITH country, AVG(moviesWatchedPerUser) AS avgMoviesWatched, COUNT(u) AS totalUsersInCountry RETURN country, avgMoviesWatched, totalUsersInCountry

question: Find the movies released in 2009 that have been watched by users from the 'US'. Return the movie titles.
cypher: MATCH (u:User {country: 'US'})-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie {year: 2009}) RETURN m.title

question: For each team that participated in the 'Sweden 1995' tournament, calculate the total number of goals scored by all players from that team and the average number of minutes played by those players. Return the team name, total goals scored, and average minutes played.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'Sweden 1995'}) MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match)<-[:PLAYED_IN]-(t) WITH t, p, COUNT(sg) AS goalsByPlayer OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[pi:PLAYED_IN]->(m) WHERE pi.minuteOn IS NOT NULL WITH t, SUM(goalsByPlayer) AS totalGoals, AVG(toFloat(replace(pi.minuteOn, '''', ''))) AS avgMinutesPlayed RETURN t.name AS teamName, totalGoals, avgMinutesPlayed

question: Find the names of all players who represent 'Ghana' and have played in matches before '1996-01-01'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:REPRESENTS]->(team:Team {name: 'Ghana'}), (p)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match) WHERE m.date < date('1996-01-01') RETURN p.name AS playerName

question: Retrieve the names of persons who visited a place between '2020-04-21 T 00:00:00 UTC' and '2020-04-23 T 00:00:00 UTC', and also return the type of place they visited.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place) WHERE v.starttime >= datetime('2020-04-21T00:00:00Z') AND v.starttime <= datetime('2020-04-23T00:00:00Z') RETURN p.name AS PersonName, pl.type AS PlaceType;

question: What are the names of the continents where 'Healthy' persons have visited at least one place?
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Healthy'})-[:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(cont:Continent) RETURN DISTINCT cont.name AS ContinentName

question: For each type of place, calculate the average duration of visits in seconds and the total number of persons who visited those places with a health status of 'Sick'. Return the place type, average duration, and total number of sick visitors.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[:PERFORMS_VISIT]->(v:Visit)-[:LOCATED_AT]->(pl:Place) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH pl.type AS placeType, v, p AVG(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDuration, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS sickVisitorCount RETURN placeType, avgDuration, sickVisitorCount

question: What is the average number of movies watched by users using each distinct IP address, and what is the total number of users who use each IP address?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie), (u)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress) WITH ip.address AS ipAddress, AVG(w.watchCount) AS avgWatchCount, COUNT(DISTINCT u) AS userCount WHERE w.watchCount IS NOT NULL RETURN ipAddress, avgWatchCount, userCount

question: For each region, compute the average number of visits made by persons before their confirmed time, and the average duration of these visits in seconds. Return the region name, average number of pre-confirmation visits, and average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region), (p)-[:PERFORMS_VISIT]->(v:Visit) WHERE v.starttime < p.confirmedtime AND v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH r.name AS region, p, v COUNT(v) AS preConfirmationVisits, AVG(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDuration WITH region, AVG(preConfirmationVisits) AS avgPreConfirmationVisits, AVG(avgDuration) AS avgVisitDuration RETURN region, avgPreConfirmationVisits, avgVisitDuration

question: How many cases reported by 'Health Professional' had a reaction described as 'Fatigue', and what is the average age of these patients?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(r:ReportSource {name: 'Health Professional'}), (c)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(re:Reaction {description: 'Fatigue'}) RETURN COUNT(c) AS totalCases, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge

question: For each continent, calculate the average number of visits performed by persons with 'Sick' health status and the average duration (in seconds) of those visits. Return the continent name, average number of visits, and average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[pv:PERFORMS_VISIT]->(v:Visit)-[:LOCATED_AT]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(cont:Continent) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH cont.name AS continentName, p, COUNT(v) AS visitCount, AVG(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDuration WITH continentName, AVG(visitCount) AS avgVisits, AVG(avgDuration) AS overallAvgDuration RETURN continentName, avgVisits, overallAvgDuration

question: For all persons with 'Healthy' healthstatus, calculate the average number of visits they performed and the average duration (in seconds) of those visits. Return the average visit count and average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Healthy'})-[:PERFORMS_VISIT]->(v:Visit) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH p, COUNT(v) AS visitCount, AVG(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDuration RETURN AVG(visitCount) AS avgVisits, AVG(avgDuration) AS avgVisitDuration;

question: What is the average amount of money transferred through MoneyTransfers that used phone numbers from the provider 'B Tee'?
cypher: MATCH (mt:MoneyTransfer)-[:WITH]->(pn:PhoneNumber) WHERE pn.provider = 'B Tee' WITH mt.amount AS transferAmount RETURN avg(transferAmount) AS AverageTransferAmount

question: For each team, determine the total number of matches played and calculate the average number of goals scored by players from that team in those matches. Return the team name, total matches played, and average goals scored per match.
cypher:
MATCH (t:Team)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m)
WHERE (p)-[:REPRESENTS]->(t)
WITH t, m, COUNT(sg) AS goalsPerMatch
WITH t, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS totalMatches, SUM(goalsPerMatch) AS totalGoals
RETURN t.name AS teamName, totalMatches, CASE WHEN totalMatches > 0 THEN toFloat(totalGoals) / totalMatches ELSE 0 END AS avgGoalsPerMatch

question: For each tournament, calculate the average number of teams that participated and the average number of players who scored goals. Return the tournament name, average teams, and average players.
cypher: MATCH (tour:Tournament)<-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]-(t:Team) WITH tour, COUNT(DISTINCT t) AS numTeams OPTIONAL MATCH (tour)<-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]-(m:Match)<-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]-(p:Person) WITH tour, numTeams, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS numPlayers WITH tour, numTeams, numPlayers RETURN tour.name AS tournamentName, AVG(numTeams), AVG(numPlayers)

question: Retrieve cases where the reported reaction is 'Pulmonary infarction' and the case was reported by 'Company Representative'. Return the case's primary ID and the name of the reporter.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction), (c)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(s:ReportSource) WHERE r.description = 'Pulmonary infarction' AND s.name = 'Company Representative' RETURN c.primaryid AS CaseID, s.name AS ReporterName

question: What are the top 3 most frequent routes of administration for 'BACLOFEN' when it is listed as a primary suspect drug, and what is the average age of the cases associated with each of these routes?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[rel:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'BACLOFEN'}) WITH rel.route AS route, AVG(c.age) AS avgAge, COUNT(*) AS routeCount ORDER BY routeCount DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN route, avgAge, routeCount

question: For each continent, calculate the total number of persons who visited at least one 'Hospital' and the average number of visits made by those persons. Return the continent name, total person count, and average visit count.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'Hospital'})-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Continent) WITH c.name AS continent, p WITH continent, COUNT(v) AS visitCount RETURN continent, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS totalPersons, AVG(visitCount) AS averageVisitCount

question: For each movie genre, what is the average watch count across all users who watched movies of that genre, and how many distinct users watched at least one movie of that genre?
cypher: MATCH (g:Genre)<-[:HAS]-(m:Movie)<-[w:WATCHED]-(u:User) WITH g.name AS genre, w.watchCount AS watchCount, u WITH genre, AVG(watchCount) AS avgWatchCount, COUNT(DISTINCT u) AS distinctUsersWatched RETURN genre, avgWatchCount, distinctUsersWatched

question: For each tournament, find the average age of players who played in matches and the total number of matches played. Return the tournament name, average player age, and total matches played.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour:Tournament) WHERE p.dob IS NOT NULL WITH tour, p, m, tour.year - p.dob.year AS playerAge WITH tour, AVG(playerAge) AS avgPlayerAge, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS totalMatchesPlayed RETURN tour.name AS tournamentName, avgPlayerAge, totalMatchesPlayed

question: Find the first name and last name of users who watched both the movie 'The War with Grandpa' and a movie with the genre 'Action'.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m1:Movie {title: 'The War with Grandpa'}), (u)-[:WATCHED]->(m2:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre {name: 'Action'}) RETURN u.firstName, u.lastName

question: For each continent, calculate the average visit duration (in seconds) and the total number of people who performed visits originating from that continent. Return the continent name, average visit duration, and total number of visitors.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Continent) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH c.name AS continent, v.duration.seconds AS visitDuration, p WITH continent, AVG(visitDuration) AS avgDuration, p RETURN continent, avgDuration, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS totalVisitors

question: Find the names of all 'Healthy' persons who visited a 'Park' after their confirmed time, along with the start time of their visit.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Healthy'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'Park'}) WHERE v.starttime > p.confirmedtime RETURN p.name AS personName, v.starttime AS visitStartTime

question: What is the average number of times a movie has been watched by users who use a specific IP address, and what is the total number of users who use that IP address?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress {address: '237.17.123.33'})-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH ip, COUNT(w) AS watchCount, u WITH ip, AVG(watchCount) AS avgWatchCount, COLLECT(DISTINCT u) AS distinctUsers RETURN ip.address, avgWatchCount, SIZE(distinctUsers) AS totalUsers

question: Find the first name and last name of all users from the 'US' who use the IP address '230.96.164.39'.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress) WHERE u.country = 'US' AND ip.address = '230.96.164.39' RETURN u.firstName AS UserFirstName, u.lastName AS UserLastName

question: For cases reported by 'Health Professional', what is the average age, and how many distinct drugs were primary suspects, grouped by the outcome of the case?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(rs:ReportSource {name: 'Health Professional'}), (c)-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome), (c)-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug) RETURN o.outcome AS outcome, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge, COUNT(DISTINCT d) AS distinctDrugCount

question: For each movie genre, what is the average watch count of movies in that genre, considering only users who have watched more than 5 movies in total?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH u, SUM(w.watchCount) AS totalWatchCount WHERE totalWatchCount > 5 MATCH (u)-[w:WATCHED]->(m)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WITH g.name AS genre, AVG(w.watchCount) AS avgWatchCount RETURN genre, avgWatchCount

question: Retrieve all cases reported by 'Company Representative' that resulted in 'Congenital Anomaly'. Also, find the primary substance of the drugs that are primary suspects in these cases. Return the case's primary ID and the drug's primary substance.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(rs:ReportSource {name: 'Company Representative'}) MATCH (c)-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Congenital Anomaly'}) MATCH (c)-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, d.primarySubstabce AS drugSubstance;

question: For each region, determine the average number of visits performed by people before their confirmed time, grouping by the health status of the persons. Return the region name, health status, and the average number of pre-confirmed visits.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:PERFORMS_VISIT]->(v:Visit) MATCH (pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region) WHERE v.starttime < p.confirmedtime WITH r.name AS regionName, p.healthstatus AS healthStatus, p, COUNT(v) AS preConfirmedVisits RETURN regionName, healthStatus, AVG(preConfirmedVisits) AS avgPreConfirmedVisits

question: For each continent, determine the total number of visits and the average duration (in seconds) of visits that occurred before '2020-04-20 T 00:00:00 UTC'. Return the continent name, total visits, and average duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Continent) WHERE v.starttime < datetime('2020-04-20T00:00:00Z') AND v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH c.name AS continentName, v.duration.seconds AS visitDuration, v RETURN continentName, COUNT(v) AS totalVisits, AVG(visitDuration) AS avgVisitDurationInSeconds

question: Find all persons whose residential location is within a 1 km radius of 'Place nr 28' and who have 'Sick' healthstatus. Return the person's name and their distance from the place.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'}), (pl:Place {name: 'Place nr 28'}) WHERE distance(p.addresslocation, pl.homelocation) < 1000 RETURN p.name AS PersonName, distance(p.addresslocation, pl.homelocation) AS Distance

question: Retrieve cases that fall under the 'Adult' age group and have 'Ventricular tachycardia' reported as a reaction. Also, retrieve the reporter's occupation for these cases. Return the case's primary ID and the reporter's occupation.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:FALLS_UNDER]->(a:AgeGroup {ageGroup: 'Adult'}), (c)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Ventricular tachycardia'}) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, c.reporterOccupation AS reporterOccupation

question: Retrieve the names of persons who visited places located in 'Belgium' and whose visit duration was longer than 10 hours. Also, return the visit's start and end times.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country {name: 'Belgium'}) WHERE v.duration.seconds > 36000 RETURN p.name AS PersonName, v.starttime AS VisitStartTime, v.endtime AS VisitEndTime

question: Find all cases where the event date is '2021-05-12' and the reporter occupation is 'Hospital'. List the drugs that are either primary, secondary, or concomitant suspects in these cases, specifying the route of administration for each drug. Return the case ID, drug name, and route of administration.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case {eventDate: date('2021-05-12'), reporterOccupation: 'Hospital'})-[r:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT|IS_SECONDARY_SUSPECT|IS_CONCOMITANT]->(d:Drug) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseID, d.name AS drugName, r.route AS routeOfAdministration

question: For each tournament, calculate the average number of goals scored per match and the total number of matches played. Return the tournament name, the average goals per match, and the total matches.
cypher:
MATCH (tour:Tournament)<-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]-(m:Match)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m)
WITH tour, m, COUNT(sg) AS goals
WITH tour, COUNT(m) AS totalMatches, SUM(goals) AS totalGoals
RETURN tour.name AS tournamentName, toFloat(totalGoals) / totalMatches AS avgGoalsPerMatch, totalMatches

question: Find cases with a report date before '2021-08-01' and an age greater than 80, where the primary suspect drug is administered through the 'Oral' route. Return the primary IDs of these cases.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug) WHERE c.age > 80 AND date(c.reportDate) < date('2021-08-01') WITH c, d MATCH (c)-[rel:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d) WHERE rel.route = 'Oral' RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId

question: For each genre, what is the average year of the movies belonging to that genre, and how many movies of that genre were released after the year 2000?
cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WITH g.name AS genre, m WHERE m.year IS NOT NULL WITH genre, m.year AS movieYear WHERE movieYear > 2000 WITH genre, AVG(movieYear) AS avgYear, COUNT(m) AS moviesAfter2000 RETURN genre, avgYear, moviesAfter2000

question: What is the maximum and minimum watch count for movies watched by users whose email contains 'hexun.com'?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WHERE u.email CONTAINS 'hexun.com' RETURN max(w.watchCount) AS MaximumWatchCount, min(w.watchCount) AS MinimumWatchCount

question: For each genre, what is the average watchCount of movies in that genre, and what is the total number of users who have watched movies of that genre?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WITH g.name AS genre, w.watchCount AS watchCount, u WITH genre, AVG(watchCount) AS avgWatchCount, COUNT(DISTINCT u) AS totalUsers RETURN genre, avgWatchCount, totalUsers

question: For each country, compute the average visit duration (in seconds) for visits to 'Hospital' places and the average visit duration for visits to 'Park' places. Return the country name, average hospital visit duration, and average park visit duration.
cypher:
MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country)
WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL AND (pl.type = 'Hospital' OR pl.type = 'Park')
WITH c.name AS country, pl.type AS placeType, v.duration.seconds AS duration
WITH country,
     AVG(CASE WHEN placeType = 'Hospital' THEN duration ELSE null END) AS avgHospitalDuration,
     AVG(CASE WHEN placeType = 'Park' THEN duration ELSE null END) AS avgParkDuration
RETURN country, avgHospitalDuration, avgParkDuration

question: Find cases that resulted in 'Hospitalization - Initial or Prolonged' and where the patient's gender is female. Return the case IDs and the event date.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case {gender: 'F'})-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Hospitalization - Initial or Prolonged'}) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseID, c.eventDate AS eventDate

question: Retrieve the names of all teams that participated in the 'USA 2003' tournament and played in matches staged as 'Group Matches'.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'USA 2003'}) , (t)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match {stage: 'Group Matches'})-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour) RETURN t.name AS teamName

question: Find all 'Sick' persons who visited a place after their confirmed infection time, and return their names along with the name of the place and the difference in days between their confirmed time and the visit start time.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place) WHERE p.confirmedtime IS NOT NULL AND v.starttime > p.confirmedtime WITH p, pl, duration.inDays(p.confirmedtime, v.starttime) AS daysDifference RETURN p.name AS PersonName, pl.name AS PlaceName, daysDifference.days AS DaysDifference;

question: Identify persons who visited a place located in 'Belgium' and whose visit duration was longer than 20000 seconds. Return the person's name, the place name, and the visit duration in seconds.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place) MATCH (pl)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country {name: 'Belgium'}) WHERE v.duration.seconds > 20000 RETURN p.name AS PersonName, pl.name AS PlaceName, v.duration.seconds AS DurationSeconds

question: For each person, find the total number of matches they played and the average number of minutes they played in each match. Return the person's name, total matches played, and average minutes played.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[r:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match) WHERE r.minuteOn IS NOT NULL WITH p, COUNT(m) AS totalMatches, AVG(toInt(r.minuteOn)) AS avgMinutesPlayed RETURN p.name AS personName, totalMatches, avgMinutesPlayed

question: Find the names of all persons who visited a place in 'Belgium' and whose health status is 'Sick'. Also, return the name of the visited place.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place) MATCH (pl)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country {name: 'Belgium'}) RETURN p.name AS PersonName, pl.name AS PlaceName

question: Find the names of all places that were visited by both 'Kaila Stanley' and 'Braden Riddle'.
cypher: MATCH (p1:Person {name: 'Kaila Stanley'})-[v1:VISITS]->(place:Place)<-[v2:VISITS]-(p2:Person {name: 'Braden Riddle'}) RETURN DISTINCT place.name AS PlaceName;

question: How many cases are associated with each route of administration for the drug 'DACARBAZINE' when it is a primary suspect?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[r:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'DACARBAZINE'}) RETURN r.route AS route, COUNT(c) AS caseCount

question: Retrieve all cases reported by 'Foreign' sources that resulted in 'Death'. Also, find the age group these cases fall under. Return the case's primary ID and the age group.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(r:ReportSource {name: 'Foreign'}) MATCH (c)-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Death'}) MATCH (c)-[:FALLS_UNDER]->(a:AgeGroup) RETURN c.primaryid AS CaseID, a.ageGroup AS AgeGroup

question: Find all cases where the drug 'DUPILUMAB' is listed as a primary suspect with a subcutaneous route and also resulted in 'Disability'. Return the case's primary ID.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[r:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'DUPILUMAB'}) WHERE r.route = 'Subcutaneous' WITH c MATCH (c)-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Disability'}) RETURN c.primaryid AS CaseID

question: What is the total number of cases reported by 'Company Representative' for each outcome, where the cases also involved the reaction 'Walking disability'?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(r:ReportSource {name: 'Company Representative'}), (c)-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome), (c)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(re:Reaction {description: 'Walking disability'}) RETURN o.outcome AS outcome, COUNT(c) AS totalCases

question: For each team, calculate the total number of matches they played and the average penalty score across all matches. Return the team name, total matches played, and average penalty score.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[r:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match) WHERE r.penaltyScore IS NOT NULL WITH t, COUNT(m) AS matchCount, SUM(r.penaltyScore) AS totalPenaltyScore RETURN t.name AS teamName, matchCount AS totalMatches, toFloat(totalPenaltyScore)/matchCount AS avgPenaltyScore;

question: Retrieve the names of all teams that participated in the 'China 2007' tournament and list the names of the players who represented those teams.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'China 2007'}), (p:Person)-[:REPRESENTS]->(t) RETURN t.name AS teamName, p.name AS playerName

question: Identify cases where a therapy was received and 'METHYLPREDNISOLONE' was prescribed, starting in the year 2021, and the case also resulted in 'Hospitalization - Initial or Prolonged'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:RECEIVED]->(t:Therapy)-[p:PRESCRIBED]->(d:Drug {name: 'METHYLPREDNISOLONE'}) WHERE p.startYear = '2021' WITH c MATCH (c)-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Hospitalization - Initial or Prolonged'}) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, d.name AS drugName

question: For each country, calculate the average duration (in seconds) of visits, grouping by the type of place visited and the health status of the person performing the visit. Return the country name, place type, health status, and average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place) MATCH (pl)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH c.name AS countryName, pl.type AS placeType, p.healthstatus AS healthStatus, v.duration.seconds AS visitDuration RETURN countryName, placeType, healthStatus, AVG(visitDuration) AS averageVisitDuration

question: Find all tournaments where the 'Japan' team participated. For each tournament, return the tournament name and the date of each match they played in that tournament.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team {name: 'Japan'})-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour:Tournament), (t)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour) RETURN tour.name AS tournamentName, m.date AS matchDate

question: Find the names of all teams that played in matches during the 'Canada 2015' tournament, and for each team, list the number of goals scored by players representing that team in those matches.
cypher: MATCH (team:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tournament:Tournament {name: 'Canada 2015'}), (team)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(match:Match), (player:Person)-[scored:SCORED_GOAL]->(match) WHERE (player)-[:REPRESENTS]->(team) WITH team, COUNT(scored) AS totalGoals RETURN team.name AS teamName, totalGoals

question: Find all players who are both coaches and players. Return the player's name and the id of the squad for which they are a coach.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:COACH_FOR]->(s:Squad) WITH p,s MATCH (p)-[:IN_SQUAD]->(s) RETURN p.name AS playerName, s.id AS squadId

question: Find all 'Sick' persons who visited places of type 'Hospital' after their confirmed infection time, and return their names and the names of the hospitals visited.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'Hospital'}) WHERE v.starttime > p.confirmedtime RETURN p.name AS PersonName, pl.name AS HospitalName

question: For cases that fall under the 'Adult' age group, what is the average age of patients, and how many cases involve the reaction 'Groin infection'?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:FALLS_UNDER]->(a:AgeGroup {ageGroup: 'Adult'}), (c)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Groin infection'}) RETURN AVG(c.age) AS averageAge, COUNT(c) AS totalCases

question: For each squad, calculate the total number of players in the squad and the average number of matches each player has played. Return the squad ID, the total number of players, and the average number of matches played per player.
cypher: MATCH (s:Squad)<-[:IN_SQUAD]-(p:Person)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match) WITH s, p, COUNT(m) AS matchesPlayedPerPlayer WITH s, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS totalPlayers, AVG(matchesPlayedPerPlayer) AS avgMatchesPerPlayer RETURN s.id AS squadId, totalPlayers, avgMatchesPerPlayer

question: For cases registered by 'TITAN PHARMACEUTICALS', what is the count of cases and average age, grouped by gender?
cypher: MATCH (m:Manufacturer {manufacturerName: 'TITAN PHARMACEUTICALS'})-[:REGISTERED]->(c:Case) RETURN c.gender AS gender, COUNT(c) AS caseCount, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge
