question: Identify users who watched 'Enchanted' and use the IP address '125.43.142.80'. Return their first names and last names.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie {title: 'Enchanted'}) WITH u MATCH (u)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress {address: '125.43.142.80'}) RETURN u.firstName, u.lastName

question: For each country, calculate the average duration in seconds of visits to 'Grocery shop' places made by 'Sick' persons. Return the country name and the average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'Grocery shop'})-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH c.name AS countryName, v.duration.seconds AS visitDuration RETURN countryName, AVG(visitDuration) AS averageVisitDuration;

question: Find all players who scored goals in matches played in the 'China 2007' tournament. Return the player's name, the match ID, and the minute they scored.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(t:Tournament {name: 'China 2007'}) RETURN p.name AS playerName, m.id AS matchId, sg.minute AS goalMinute

question: Among cases reported by 'Consumer', what is the average age of patients experiencing 'Flushing' as a reaction, grouped by their age group?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(r:ReportSource {name: 'Consumer'}), (c)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(re:Reaction {description: 'Flushing'}), (c)-[:FALLS_UNDER]->(ag:AgeGroup) RETURN ag.ageGroup AS ageGroup, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge

question: Find all cases where 'DIPHENHYDRAMINE HYDROCHLORIDE' is a primary suspect and the case resulted in 'Other Serious (Important Medical Event)'. Return the case's primary ID and the event date.
cypher: MATCH (d:Drug {primarySubstabce: 'DIPHENHYDRAMINE HYDROCHLORIDE'})<-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]-(c:Case)-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Other Serious (Important Medical Event)'}) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, c.eventDate AS eventDate

question: How many cases reported by 'Physician' had 'SERTRALINE' as a primary suspect drug, and what was the average age of these patients?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(r:ReportSource {name: 'Physician'}), (c)-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'SERTRALINE'}) RETURN COUNT(c) AS caseCount, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge

question: What are the names of the financial institutions that have both bank accounts and money transfers associated with them, and what is the total amount of money transferred to those banks?
cypher:
MATCH (fi:FinancialInstitute)<-[:FROM]-(ba:BankAccount)<-[:SEND]-(mt:MoneyTransfer)
WITH fi, SUM(mt.amount) AS totalAmount
RETURN fi.name, totalAmount

question: What is the average age of cases that reported the reaction 'Glossitis' and were reported by 'Company Representative', grouped by the gender of the case?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Glossitis'}), (c)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(rs:ReportSource {name: 'Company Representative'}) RETURN c.gender AS gender, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge

question: What is the total number of movies watched by female and male users, broken down by genre, considering only users whose email contains 'tinypic.com'?
cypher: MATCH (u:User {email: 'hdanielovitch4j@tinypic.com'})-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) RETURN u.gender AS gender, g.name AS genre, COUNT(m) AS totalMoviesWatched

question: For each genre, what is the average watch count of movies in that genre, and what is the total number of distinct users who watched movies in that genre?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WITH g.name AS genre, w.watchCount AS watchCount, u WITH genre, AVG(watchCount) AS averageWatchCount, COLLECT(DISTINCT u.userId) AS distinctUserIds RETURN genre, averageWatchCount, SIZE(distinctUserIds) AS totalDistinctUsers

question: For each genre, what is the average year of movies and the total number of movies that have that genre?
cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WITH g.name AS genre, m RETURN genre, AVG(m.year) AS averageYear, COUNT(m) AS totalMovies

question: Retrieve the address of the IP address used by users with the gender 'Female' and the title of the movies which have the genre 'Action'.
cypher: MATCH (u:User {gender: 'Female'})-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress) MATCH (m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre {name: 'Action'}) RETURN ip.address AS IpAddress, m.title AS MovieTitle

question: For each type of place, calculate the average visit duration in seconds and the number of persons who visited that type of place at least once. Return the place type, average visit duration, and the number of unique visitors.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:VISITS]->(pl:Place) WHERE p.id IS NOT NULL WITH pl.type AS placeType, p, AVG(duration.seconds) AS avgDuration MATCH (p)-[:VISITS]->(pl2:Place) WHERE pl2.type = placeType WITH placeType, avgDuration, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS uniqueVisitors RETURN placeType, avgDuration, uniqueVisitors

question: Retrieve the names and IDs of all persons who visited 'Place nr 31' and whose visit duration was longer than 1 hour.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {name: 'Place nr 31'}) WHERE v.duration > duration('PT1H') RETURN p.name AS PersonName, p.id AS PersonID

question: For each team that participated in the 'USA 1999' tournament, find the players who scored at least one goal in any match. Return the team name, the player's name, and the number of goals scored by that player.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'USA 1999'}), (p:Person)-[:REPRESENTS]->(t), (p)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match) WITH t, p, COUNT(sg) AS goals WHERE goals > 0 RETURN t.name AS teamName, p.name AS playerName, goals ORDER BY teamName, goals DESC

question: For each type of place, calculate the average duration of visits made by persons with 'Sick' healthstatus. Return the place type and the average visit duration in seconds.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH pl.type AS placeType, AVG(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDuration RETURN placeType, avgDuration

question: For each region, calculate the average duration (in seconds) of visits made by persons with 'Healthy' status and the total number of distinct places visited by 'Sick' persons. Return the region name, average duration, and total distinct places count.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region) WITH r.name AS region, p, pl, v WHERE p.healthstatus = 'Healthy' WITH region, AVG(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDuration, COLLECT(DISTINCT pl.id) AS healthyPlaces MATCH (p2:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v2:VISITS]->(pl2:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r2:Region {name: region}) WITH region, avgDuration, COUNT(DISTINCT pl2.id) AS sickDistinctPlaces RETURN region, avgDuration, sickDistinctPlaces

question: For each manufacturer, what is the total number of cases registered where the reaction description is 'Surgery'?
cypher: MATCH (m:Manufacturer)-[:REGISTERED]->(c:Case)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Surgery'}) RETURN m.manufacturerName AS manufacturerName, COUNT(c) AS caseCount

question: Find all cases where the drug 'MAGNESIUM CITRATE' is listed as a primary suspect and the patient's age is greater than 70. Return the primary IDs of these cases.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'MAGNESIUM CITRATE'}) WHERE c.age > 70 RETURN c.primaryid AS CaseID

question: For each continent, find the average duration of visits to places within that continent. Return the continent name and the average visit duration in seconds.
cypher: MATCH (v:Visit)-[:LOCATED_AT]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(cont:Continent) WITH cont.name AS ContinentName, v.duration.seconds AS VisitDuration RETURN ContinentName, avg(VisitDuration) AS AverageVisitDuration

question: Identify all teams that played in matches on '1995-06-10'. For each team, list the names of the players who represented them in those matches and the stage of the match.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match {date: date('1995-06-10')})<-[:PLAYED_IN]-(p:Person)-[:REPRESENTS]->(t) RETURN t.name AS teamName, p.name AS playerName, m.stage AS matchStage

question: Identify cases involving patients in the 'Child' age group who experienced a reaction, and for those cases, retrieve the names of any drugs that were either primary, secondary, or concomitant suspects.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:FALLS_UNDER]->(ag:AgeGroup {ageGroup: 'Child'}) MATCH (c)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction) MATCH (c)-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT|:IS_SECONDARY_SUSPECT|:IS_CONCOMITANT]->(d:Drug) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, d.name AS drugName

question: What is the average age of cases reported by 'Consumer', grouped by the year of the event date, and how many cases occurred in each year?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(rs:ReportSource {name: 'Consumer'}) WHERE c.eventDate IS NOT NULL WITH c, c.eventDate AS eventDate RETURN date(eventDate).year AS eventYear, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge, COUNT(c) AS totalCases ORDER BY eventYear

question: Retrieve the names of all teams that participated in the 'China 2007' tournament and the names of all players who represent those teams.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'China 2007'}), (p:Person)-[:REPRESENTS]->(t) RETURN t.name AS teamName, p.name AS playerName

question: Find all players who scored goals in matches during the 'France 2019' tournament. Return each player's name and the IDs of the matches in which they scored.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'France 2019'}) RETURN p.name AS playerName, m.id AS matchId

question: For each team, calculate the total number of players who represent the team and the average number of matches played by those players. Return the team name, total players, and average matches per player.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)<-[:REPRESENTS]-(p:Person)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match) WITH t, p, COUNT(m) AS matchesPlayed WITH t, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS totalPlayers, AVG(matchesPlayed) AS avgMatchesPerPlayer RETURN t.name AS teamName, totalPlayers, avgMatchesPerPlayer

question: Find the last names of users who watched the movie 'Old' and use an IP address that starts with '70.225'.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.title = 'Old' WITH u MATCH (u)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress) WHERE ip.address STARTS WITH '70.225' RETURN u.lastName

question: Identify all 'Healthy' persons who visited a place in 'Belgium' before they were confirmed to be 'Healthy'. Return their names and the names of the places.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Healthy'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country {name: 'Belgium'}) WHERE p.confirmedtime > v.starttime RETURN p.name AS PersonName, pl.name AS PlaceName

question: For each country, determine the total number of visits performed by people before their confirmed time and calculate the average of these visit counts. Return the country name and the average number of pre-confirmation visits.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:PERFORMS_VISIT]->(v:Visit) MATCH (v)-[:LOCATED_AT]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country) WHERE v.starttime < p.confirmedtime WITH c.name AS countryName, p, COUNT(v) AS preConfirmationVisits RETURN countryName, AVG(preConfirmationVisits) AS avgPreConfirmationVisits

question: For each country, find the average duration in seconds of visits to 'Restaurant' places made by persons whose confirmed time is after '2020-04-20'. Return the country name and the average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'Restaurant'}) MATCH (pl)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country) WHERE p.confirmedtime > datetime('2020-04-20T00:00:00.000Z') AND v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH c.name AS country, v.duration.seconds AS visitDuration RETURN country, AVG(visitDuration)

question: For each tournament, find the team with the highest average 'score' in matches. Return the tournament name, the team name, and the average 'score' for that team in that tournament.
cypher:
MATCH (t:Team)-[r:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour:Tournament)
WHERE r.score IS NOT NULL
WITH tour, t, AVG(r.score) AS avgScore
ORDER BY tour.name, avgScore DESC
WITH tour, COLLECT({team: t.name, avgScore: avgScore}) AS teamScores
RETURN tour.name AS tournamentName, teamScores[0].team AS teamName, teamScores[0].avgScore AS averageScore

question: Find all the players who scored goals in matches played in the 'China PR 1991' tournament. Return the player's name, the match ID, and the minute the goal was scored.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(t:Tournament {name: 'China PR 1991'}) RETURN p.name AS playerName, m.id AS matchId, sg.minute AS goalMinute

question: For purchases made using logins associated with 'Vandervort LLC', find the delivery addresses and the total amount spent on those purchases.
cypher: MATCH (s:Shop {name: 'Vandervort LLC'})<-[:FOR_SHOP]-(l:Login)<-[:WITH_LOGIN]-(p:Purchase)-[:DELIVERED_AT]->(da:DeliveryAddress) WITH da, SUM(p.amount) AS TotalAmount RETURN da.streetAddress AS DeliveryAddress, TotalAmount

question: For each squad, determine the total number of players and calculate the average number of matches played by the players in that squad. Return the squad ID, total players, and average matches played per player.
cypher:
MATCH (s:Squad)<-[:IN_SQUAD]-(p:Person)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match)
WITH s, p, COUNT(m) AS matchesPlayed
WITH s, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS totalPlayers, AVG(matchesPlayed) AS avgMatchesPerPlayer
RETURN s.id AS squadId, totalPlayers, avgMatchesPerPlayer

question: Find all persons who visited a place after they were confirmed to be 'Sick', and return their names along with the names of the places they visited after confirmation.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place) WHERE p.confirmedtime IS NOT NULL AND v.starttime > p.confirmedtime RETURN p.name AS PersonName, pl.name AS PlaceName

question: What are the titles of movies watched by users from 'US' who use the IP address '70.225.22.106'?
cypher: MATCH (u:User {country: 'US'})-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie), (u)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress {address: '70.225.22.106'}) RETURN m.title AS MovieTitle

question: Retrieve cases that resulted in 'Other Serious (Important Medical Event)' outcomes and where the reporter occupation is 'Consumer'. Display the primary IDs of these cases.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Other Serious (Important Medical Event)'}) WHERE c.reporterOccupation = 'Consumer' RETURN c.primaryid AS CaseID

question: For each state in the US, what is the total number of users and the average number of movies watched by users from that state? Return the state, total users, and average watch count.
cypher: MATCH (u:User {country: 'US'})-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH u.state AS State, COUNT(u) AS TotalUsers, AVG(w.watchCount) AS AverageWatchCount RETURN State, TotalUsers, AverageWatchCount

question: For each manufacturer, what is the average age of patients in cases they registered that involved the reaction 'Connective tissue disorder'?
cypher: MATCH (m:Manufacturer)-[:REGISTERED]->(c:Case)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Connective tissue disorder'}) RETURN m.manufacturerName AS manufacturer, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge;

question: Calculate the average visit duration (in seconds) for visits occurring before and after '2020-04-15 T00:00:00 UTC', grouping the results by the health status of the person performing the visit.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH p.healthstatus AS healthStatus, v.starttime AS startTime, v.duration.seconds AS visitDuration, date('2020-04-15') AS comparisonDate WITH healthStatus, visitDuration, CASE WHEN startTime < datetime('2020-04-15T00:00:00 UTC') THEN 'Before' ELSE 'After' END AS timePeriod RETURN timePeriod, healthStatus, AVG(visitDuration) AS averageDuration

question: Calculate the average visit duration in seconds for visits to 'Bar' type places, grouping the results by the health status of the persons performing the visits. Return the health status and the average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'Bar'}) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH p.healthstatus AS healthStatus, v.duration.seconds AS duration RETURN healthStatus, AVG(duration)

question: For each player who scored goals in matches within the 'China PR 1991' tournament, determine the average number of goals scored per match they played in that tournament. Return the player's name and the average goals per match.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'China PR 1991'}) WITH p, m, COUNT(sg) AS goalsPerMatch WITH p, AVG(goalsPerMatch) AS avgGoalsPerMatch RETURN p.name AS playerName, avgGoalsPerMatch

question: Find the names of 'Healthy' persons who visited the same place as 'Sick' persons, and return the names of those places.
cypher: MATCH (healthy:Person {healthstatus: 'Healthy'})-[hv:VISITS]->(place:Place)<-[sv:VISITS]-(sick:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'}) RETURN DISTINCT healthy.name AS healthyPersonName, place.name AS placeName

question: Find the names of all persons who visited at least two different places of type 'Mall' and whose address location's latitude is greater than 51.21 and confirmed time is not null.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'Mall'}) WHERE p.addresslocation.latitude > 51.21 AND p.confirmedtime IS NOT NULL WITH p, count(DISTINCT pl) AS mallCount WHERE mallCount >= 2 RETURN p.name AS PersonName

question: What are the top 3 most frequent routes of administration for 'POLYETHYLENE GLYCOL 3350' as a primary suspect drug, and how many cases are associated with each route?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[r:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'POLYETHYLENE GLYCOL 3350'}) RETURN r.route AS route, COUNT(c) AS caseCount ORDER BY caseCount DESC LIMIT 3

question: For users who use the IP address '237.17.123.33', find the titles of the movies they watched that were released after the year 2000 and order the results by the movie title.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress), (u)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WHERE ip.address = '237.17.123.33' AND m.year > 2000 RETURN m.title ORDER BY m.title

question: For each tournament, calculate the average number of players who scored goals in matches within that tournament and the total number of matches played. Return the tournament name, average number of goal-scoring players, and total match count.
cypher:
MATCH (tour:Tournament)<-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]-(m:Match)<-[:PLAYED_IN]-(p:Person)-[:SCORED_GOAL]->(m)
WITH tour, m, collect(DISTINCT p) AS playersWhoScored
WITH tour, count(m) AS totalMatches, size(playersWhoScored) AS numPlayersWhoScored
WITH tour, totalMatches, numPlayersWhoScored
RETURN tour.name AS tournamentName, toFloat(sum(numPlayersWhoScored))/count(DISTINCT tour) AS avgGoalScoringPlayers, totalMatches

question: What are the account numbers of BankAccounts that sent MoneyTransfers with an amount greater than 900 on '2018-02-07'?
cypher: MATCH (ba:BankAccount)-[:SEND]->(mt:MoneyTransfer {transactionDate: '2018-02-07'}) WHERE mt.amount > 900 RETURN ba.accountNumber

question: For each genre, what is the average year of movies in that genre, and how many movies are in that genre that users from 'US' have watched?
cypher: MATCH (g:Genre)<-[:HAS]-(m:Movie)<-[w:WATCHED]-(u:User {country: 'US'}) WITH g, m, u WHERE u.country = 'US' WITH g.name AS genreName, AVG(m.year) AS avgYear, COUNT(m) AS movieCount RETURN genreName, avgYear, movieCount

question: Retrieve the names of persons who visited places of type 'Park' and whose address location x coordinates are between 51.21 and 51.22.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:VISITS]->(pl:Place) WHERE pl.type = 'Park' AND p.addresslocation.x >= 51.21 AND p.addresslocation.x <= 51.22 RETURN p.name AS personName

question: Find the users who use the IP address '50.186.166.29' and have watched a movie released in the year 2008. Return their first name and last name.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress {address: '50.186.166.29'}) WITH u MATCH (u)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie {year: 2008}) RETURN u.firstName, u.lastName

question: For each region, determine the average number of visits performed by each person and the average duration of those visits. Return the region name, average visits per person, and average visit duration in seconds.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH r.name AS region, p, COUNT(pl) AS numVisits, AVG(v.duration.seconds) as avgDurationPerVisit WITH region, AVG(numVisits) AS avgVisitsPerPerson, AVG(avgDurationPerVisit) AS avgDuration RETURN region, avgVisitsPerPerson, avgDuration

question: Find all matches in the 'Germany 2011' tournament where the team 'England' played, and for each match, retrieve the stage of the match and the score the England team achieved.
cypher: MATCH (team:Team {name: 'England'})-[:PLAYED_IN]->(match:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tournament:Tournament {name: 'Germany 2011'}), (team)-[playedIn:PLAYED_IN]->(match) RETURN match.stage AS matchStage, playedIn.score AS englandScore

question: For each person who played in a match, find the average number of goals they scored per match and the total number of matches they played in. Return the person's name, average goals per match, and total matches played, ordering by average goals in descending order.
cypher:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m)
WITH p, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS totalMatches, COUNT(sg) AS totalGoals
RETURN p.name AS playerName, CASE WHEN totalMatches > 0 THEN toFloat(totalGoals) / totalMatches ELSE 0 END AS avgGoalsPerMatch, totalMatches
ORDER BY avgGoalsPerMatch DESC

question: Find all drugs prescribed in therapies that are received by cases reported by 'Consumer', and where the primary substance of the drug is 'DOLUTEGRAVIR'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(r:ReportSource {name: 'Consumer'})-[:RECEIVED]->(t:Therapy)-[:PRESCRIBED]->(d:Drug {primarySubstabce: 'DOLUTEGRAVIR'}) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, d.name AS drugName

question: Retrieve all cases where the reported reaction is 'Foreign body in respiratory tract' and the case was reported by a 'Health Professional'. Return the primary IDs of the cases and the names of the reporting sources.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Foreign body in respiratory tract'}), (c)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(rs:ReportSource {name: 'Health Professional'}) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, rs.name AS reportSourceName

question: Find the names of all players who scored goals in matches played in the 'China PR 1991' tournament, along with the minute of each goal.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(t:Tournament {name: 'China PR 1991'}) RETURN p.name AS playerName, sg.minute AS goalMinute

question: What is the average number of movies watched by users using each IP address, and what is the average user ID of those users?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[r:USES]->(ip:IpAddress)-[:WATCHED]-(m:Movie) WITH ip.address AS ipAddress, AVG(r.watchCount) AS avgWatchCount, AVG(u.userId) AS avgUserId RETURN ipAddress, avgWatchCount, avgUserId

question: Retrieve cases where the reporter occupation is 'Consumer' and the reported reaction is 'Visual field defect'. Also, find the manufacturer that registered these cases.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(r:ReportSource {name: 'Consumer'}), (c)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(re:Reaction {description: 'Visual field defect'}), (m:Manufacturer)-[:REGISTERED]->(c) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, m.manufacturerName AS manufacturerName

question: What is the average balance across all BankAccounts, and what is the average loan amount for all UnsecuredLoans associated with AccountHolders?
cypher: MATCH (ba:BankAccount) WITH avg(ba.balance) AS avgBankAccountBalance MATCH (ah:AccountHolder)-[:HAS_UNSECUREDLOAN]->(ul:UnsecuredLoan) RETURN avgBankAccountBalance, avg(ul.loanAmount) AS avgLoanAmount

question: For each state, what is the average number of movies watched by female users compared to male users?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH u.state AS state, u.gender AS gender, COUNT(m) AS movieCount WITH state, gender, AVG(movieCount) AS avgMovieCount GROUP BY state RETURN state, AVG(CASE WHEN gender = 'Female' THEN avgMovieCount ELSE null END) AS avgFemaleMovies, AVG(CASE WHEN gender = 'Male' THEN avgMovieCount ELSE null END) AS avgMaleMovies

question: Find all drugs prescribed in therapies with start year 2021 and end year 2021, and are primary suspects in cases reported by 'Health Professional'. Return the names of the drugs.
cypher: MATCH (d:Drug)<-[:PRESCRIBED]-(t:Therapy)-[:RECEIVED]-(c:Case)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(r:ReportSource {name: 'Health Professional'}) WHERE (t)-[p:PRESCRIBED]->(d) AND p.startYear = '2021' AND p.endYear = '2021' AND (c)-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d) RETURN d.name

question: Find the email addresses of users who have watched the movie 'Marley and Me' and whose gender is 'Male'.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WHERE u.gender = 'Male' AND m.title = 'Marley and Me' RETURN u.email

question: Find the names of all teams that participated in the 'China 2007' tournament and played in matches on '2007-09-30'.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'China 2007'}), (t)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match {date: date('2007-09-30')}) RETURN t.name AS teamName

question: For each gender, what is the average year of movies watched, and what is the total number of users of each gender who have watched at least one movie?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH u.gender AS gender, u, m.year AS movieYear RETURN gender, AVG(movieYear) AS averageMovieYear, COUNT(DISTINCT u) AS totalUsers ORDER BY gender

question: Find cases where a patient received therapy and experienced 'Wrist fracture' as a reaction, and the therapy prescribed a drug with the primary substance 'ZOLPIDEM TARTRATE'. Return the case's primary ID and the description of the reaction.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:RECEIVED]->(t:Therapy)-[:PRESCRIBED]->(d:Drug {primarySubstabce: 'ZOLPIDEM TARTRATE'}), (c)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Wrist fracture'}) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, r.description AS reactionDescription

question: For each continent, calculate the ratio of visits made by 'Sick' persons to the total number of visits to 'Mall' places. Return the continent name and the sick visit ratio as a percentage.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'Mall'}) MATCH (pl)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Continent) WITH c, p, pl MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'Mall'})-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Continent) WITH c.name AS continentName, COUNT(v) AS sickVisits, COUNT(pl) AS totalMallVisits RETURN continentName, toFloat(sickVisits) / totalMallVisits * 100 AS sickVisitRatio

question: Retrieve the email addresses of all users who use the IP address '199.231.127.16' and have watched at least one movie with the genre 'Adventure'.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress {address: '199.231.127.16'}) WITH u MATCH (u)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre {name: 'Adventure'}) RETURN u.email

question: For each year, what is the average watch count of movies released in that year, and how many distinct users watched movies released in that year?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH m.year AS year, u, w.watchCount AS watchCount RETURN year, AVG(watchCount) AS averageWatchCount, COUNT(DISTINCT u) AS totalDistinctUsers

question: For each region, determine the total number of persons who visited places in that region and calculate the average number of visits per person. Only consider persons whose health status is 'Sick'. Return the region name, total count of 'Sick' visitors, and the average number of visits per 'Sick' person.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region) WITH r, p, COUNT(v) AS visitsCount WITH r.name AS regionName, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS totalSickVisitors, AVG(visitsCount) AS avgVisitsPerSickPerson RETURN regionName, totalSickVisitors, avgVisitsPerSickPerson

question: For each team that participated in the 'USA 1999' tournament, retrieve the team's name and the names of all players who represented that team and scored at least one goal in any match of that tournament.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'USA 1999'}) MATCH (p:Person)-[:REPRESENTS]->(t)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour) WHERE (p)-[:SCORED_GOAL]->(m) RETURN t.name AS teamName, COLLECT(DISTINCT p.name) AS players

question: For each state, what is the average number of times users have watched movies, and what is the total number of distinct genres watched by users in that state?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WITH u.state AS state, w.watchCount AS watchCount, g.name AS genre WITH state, AVG(watchCount) AS averageWatchCount, COLLECT(DISTINCT genre) AS distinctGenresWatched WITH state, averageWatchCount, SIZE(distinctGenresWatched) AS totalDistinctGenresWatched RETURN state, averageWatchCount, totalDistinctGenresWatched

question: Find cases where the patient's age is over 60 and the case resulted in 'Hospitalization - Initial or Prolonged'. Also, find the drugs used in those cases with 'Oral' route of administration. Return the case IDs and drug names.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Hospitalization - Initial or Prolonged'}) WHERE c.age > 60 WITH c MATCH (c)-[rel:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT|IS_SECONDARY_SUSPECT|IS_CONCOMITANT|IS_INTERACTING]->(d:Drug) WHERE rel.route = 'Oral' RETURN DISTINCT c.primaryid AS caseId, d.name AS drugName

question: Find the users whose phone number starts with '167' and watched a movie released in 2021. Return the user's first name, last name, email, and the title of the movie they watched.
cypher: MATCH (u:User {phone: '167-293-1642'})-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie {year: 2021}) RETURN u.firstName, u.lastName, u.email, m.title

question: For each player, find the total number of matches they played and the average number of goals they scored per match where they scored at least one goal. Return the player's name, total matches played, and average goals per match.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match) WITH p, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS totalMatches OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m2:Match) WITH p, totalMatches, COUNT(sg) AS totalGoals WHERE totalGoals > 0 RETURN p.name AS playerName, totalMatches, CASE WHEN totalMatches > 0 THEN toFloat(totalGoals) / totalMatches ELSE 0 END AS avgGoalsPerMatch

question: Find the first name and last name of users from 'Ohio' who watched the movie 'Doctor' and count how many times they watched it.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WHERE u.state = 'Ohio' AND m.title = 'Doctor' RETURN u.firstName AS FirstName, u.lastName AS LastName, w.watchCount AS WatchCount

question: For each continent, calculate the average duration (in seconds) of visits performed by people with 'Healthy' status to places of type 'Hospital'. Return the continent name and the average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Healthy'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'Hospital'}) MATCH (pl)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(cont:Continent) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH cont.name AS continent, AVG(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDuration RETURN continent, avgDuration

question: Retrieve all cases where the reporter occupation is 'Physician' and the patient is prescribed a drug with 'Oral' route of administration as a primary suspect. Return the case IDs and the drug names.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case {reporterOccupation: 'Physician'})-[r:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug) WHERE r.route = 'Oral' RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, d.name AS drugName

question: Find the names of manufacturers who have registered cases that fall under the 'Infant' age group and have 'Lymphocyte count decreased' as a reaction.
cypher: MATCH (m:Manufacturer)-[:REGISTERED]->(c:Case)-[:FALLS_UNDER]->(a:AgeGroup {ageGroup: 'Infant'}) MATCH (c)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Lymphocyte count decreased'}) RETURN m.manufacturerName AS manufacturerName

question: For each tournament in 2011, calculate the average number of players per team and the total number of goals scored across all matches. Return the tournament name, average players per team, and total goals scored.
cypher: MATCH (tour:Tournament {year: 2011})<-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]-(m:Match)<-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]-(p:Person)-[:REPRESENTS]->(t:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour) WITH tour, t, p, COUNT(sg) AS goalsPerPlayer  WITH tour, t, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS playersPerTeam, SUM(goalsPerPlayer) AS totalGoalsPerTeam WITH tour, AVG(playersPerTeam) AS avgPlayersPerTeam, SUM(totalGoalsPerTeam) AS totalGoals RETURN tour.name AS tournamentName, avgPlayersPerTeam, totalGoals

question: What is the total number of cases associated with the drug 'TAKHZYRO' as a primary suspect, grouped by the age group they fall under?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:FALLS_UNDER]->(a:AgeGroup), (c)-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'TAKHZYRO'}) RETURN a.ageGroup AS ageGroup, COUNT(c) AS totalCases

question: What is the total number of cases associated with each manufacturer where the primary suspect drug is 'PROTONIX'?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'PROTONIX'}), (m:Manufacturer)-[:REGISTERED]->(c) RETURN m.manufacturerName AS manufacturer, COUNT(c) AS totalCases

question: Find the names of all genres associated with movies watched by users whose first name is 'Danyette' and last name is 'McIntosh'.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WHERE u.firstName = 'Danyette' AND u.lastName = 'McIntosh' RETURN g.name

question: What are the titles of the movies that users with the last name 'Basnett' have watched, and how many times have they watched each movie?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WHERE u.lastName = 'Basnett' RETURN m.title, w.watchCount

question: Retrieve all distinct cases where the drug 'ALUNBRIG' is listed as a primary suspect and the patient's age is greater than 70. Return the case's primary ID and the patient's age.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'ALUNBRIG'}) WHERE c.age > 70 RETURN DISTINCT c.primaryid AS caseId, c.age AS patientAge

question: Find cases where the drug 'LUTATHERA', with primary substance 'LUTETIUM OXODOTREOTIDE LU-177', is listed as both a primary suspect and is also prescribed for therapy. Return the case IDs.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'LUTATHERA', primarySubstabce: 'LUTETIUM OXODOTREOTIDE LU-177'}) WITH c, d MATCH (c)-[:RECEIVED]->(t:Therapy)-[:PRESCRIBED]->(d) RETURN DISTINCT c.primaryid AS caseId

question: For each person, determine the number of tournaments they played in and the average number of goals they scored per match. Return the person's name, the number of tournaments, and their average goals per match.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour:Tournament) OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m) WITH p, COUNT(DISTINCT tour) AS tournamentCount, COUNT(sg) AS totalGoals, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS totalMatches RETURN p.name AS personName, tournamentCount, CASE WHEN totalMatches = 0 THEN 0 ELSE toFloat(totalGoals) / totalMatches END AS avgGoalsPerMatch

question: For each movie genre, what is the average watch count of movies in that genre, and what is the total number of movies in that genre?
cypher: MATCH (g:Genre)<-[:HAS]-(m:Movie)<-[w:WATCHED]-(u:User) WITH g.name AS genre, m, w.watchCount AS watchCount WITH genre, AVG(watchCount) AS avgWatchCount, COUNT(m) AS totalMovies RETURN genre, avgWatchCount, totalMovies

question: For each age group, what is the average age of cases where 'CETIRIZINE HYDROCHLORIDE OR KETOTIFEN FUMARATE' is the primary substance of a drug involved, and how many such cases are there?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:FALLS_UNDER]->(ag:AgeGroup), (c)-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {primarySubstabce: 'CETIRIZINE HYDROCHLORIDE OR KETOTIFEN FUMARATE'}) RETURN ag.ageGroup AS ageGroup, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge, COUNT(c) AS caseCount

question: Find all matches played in the 'China 2007' tournament where a player named 'Yulia Yushekivitch' scored a goal. Return the match ID and the date of the match.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {name: 'Yulia Yushekivitch'})-[:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'China 2007'}) RETURN m.id AS matchId, m.date AS matchDate

question: For cases involving the drug 'ALDESLEUKIN' as a primary suspect, what is the count of cases and the average age, grouped by the reporter's occupation?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'ALDESLEUKIN'}), (c)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(r:ReportSource) RETURN r.name AS reporterOccupation, COUNT(c) AS caseCount, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge

question: Find AccountHolders who have a PhoneNumber provided by 'B Tee' and a CreditCard with latePayments greater than 0. Return the full name of those AccountHolders.
cypher:
MATCH (ah:AccountHolder)-[:HAS_PHONENUMBER]->(pn:PhoneNumber) 
WHERE pn.provider = 'B Tee'
MATCH (ah)-[:HAS_CREDITCARD]->(cc:CreditCard) 
WHERE cc.latePayments > 0
RETURN ah.fullName

question: What is the average number of genres associated with movies watched by users whose first name is 'Jacquelyn'?
cypher: MATCH (u:User {firstName: 'Jacquelyn'})-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WITH m, COUNT(g) AS genreCount RETURN AVG(genreCount) AS averageGenres

question: Identify cases registered by 'PHARMACOSMOS' where the outcome was 'Death' and the reporter's occupation was 'Consumer'. Return the primary IDs of these cases.
cypher: MATCH (m:Manufacturer {manufacturerName: 'PHARMACOSMOS'})-[:REGISTERED]->(c:Case {reporterOccupation: 'Consumer'})-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Death'}) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId

question: For each year, what is the average number of times a movie released in that year was watched, and what is the total number of movies released in that year?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH m.year AS releaseYear, w.watchCount AS watchCount, m WITH releaseYear, AVG(watchCount) AS avgWatchCount, COUNT(m) AS totalMovies RETURN releaseYear, avgWatchCount, totalMovies

question: Retrieve the names of all teams that participated in the 'France 2019' tournament and list the names of the players who played in matches for those teams. Also, return the date of each match.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'France 2019'}), (t)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match), (p:Person)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m), (p)-[:REPRESENTS]->(t) RETURN t.name AS teamName, p.name AS playerName, m.date AS matchDate

question: Find all cases where the patient is in the 'Adolescent' age group and the event date occurred in August 2020. Return the case's primary ID and event date.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:FALLS_UNDER]->(a:AgeGroup {ageGroup: 'Adolescent'}) WHERE c.eventDate = date('2020-08-04') RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, c.eventDate AS eventDate;

question: For cases reported by 'Consumer', what is the average age and the number of cases that resulted in 'Hospitalization - Initial or Prolonged'?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(r:ReportSource {name: 'Consumer'}), (c)-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Hospitalization - Initial or Prolonged'}) RETURN AVG(c.age) AS averageAge, COUNT(c) AS caseCount

question: Find cases where 'MAGNESIUM SULFATE' is listed as a primary suspect and the patient's age is greater than 60. Return the primary IDs and ages of these cases.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {primarySubstabce: 'MAGNESIUM SULFATE'}) WHERE c.age > 60 RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, c.age AS age

question: Find all matches played in the 'China 2007' tournament where 'Brazil' participated, and for each match, list the names of players who scored a goal, along with the minute the goal was scored.
cypher: MATCH (m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(t:Tournament {name: 'China 2007'}), (team:Team {name: 'Brazil'})-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m), (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m) RETURN m.id AS matchId, t.name AS tournamentName, team.name AS teamName, p.name AS playerName, sg.minute AS goalMinute

question: For each manufacturer, calculate the number of cases they registered where the patient's gender was 'F' and the case involved a reaction described as 'White blood cell count increased'.
cypher: MATCH (m:Manufacturer)-[:REGISTERED]->(c:Case) WHERE c.gender = 'F' WITH m, c MATCH (c)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'White blood cell count increased'}) RETURN m.manufacturerName AS Manufacturer, COUNT(c) AS FemaleCasesWithReaction

question: Find all the players who scored goals in matches played in the 'USA 1999' tournament. Return the player's name, the match ID, and the minute at which the goal was scored.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(t:Tournament {name: 'USA 1999'}) RETURN p.name AS playerName, m.id AS matchId, sg.minute AS goalMinute

question: For each type of place, calculate the average visit duration in seconds and the number of persons with 'Healthy' status who visited that type of place. Return the place type, average duration, and the count of healthy visitors.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:VISITS]->(pl:Place) WHERE p.healthstatus = 'Healthy' WITH pl.type AS placeType, p, duration(p,pl) AS durationInSeconds MATCH (p)-[:VISITS]->(pl2:Place) WHERE pl2.type = placeType WITH placeType, AVG(durationInSeconds) AS avgDuration, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS healthyVisitorCount RETURN placeType, avgDuration, healthyVisitorCount

question: For each region, calculate the percentage of visits that occurred at 'Mall' type places. Return the region name and the percentage of visits at malls.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region) WITH r, pl, v MATCH (p)-[v2:VISITS]->(pl2:Place {type: 'Mall'})-[:PART_OF]->(r) WITH r.name AS region, COUNT(v) AS totalVisits, COUNT(CASE WHEN pl2.type = 'Mall' THEN v2 ELSE NULL END) AS mallVisits RETURN region, toFloat(mallVisits) / totalVisits * 100 AS mallVisitPercentage

question: Retrieve cases where the drug 'PACLITAXEL' is a primary suspect with indication 'Ovarian cancer', and the reporter occupation is 'Physician'. Return the case's primary ID and the drug's name.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[r:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'PACLITAXEL'}) WHERE r.indication = 'Ovarian cancer' MATCH (c) WHERE c.reporterOccupation = 'Physician' RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, d.name AS drugName

question: For each country, compute the average visit duration in seconds, and the number of people who visited at least one place. Return the country name, the average visit duration and the number of people who visited at least one place.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country) WITH c.name AS country, p, avg(duration(p,pl).seconds) as avg_duration MATCH (p:Person)-[:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country) WITH country, avg_duration, count(DISTINCT p) AS people_visited RETURN country, avg_duration, people_visited

question: Find all players who were in a squad 'China PR in 2007', and retrieve the names of the tournaments for which that squad was formed.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:IN_SQUAD]->(s:Squad {id:'China PR in 2007'}), (s)-[:FOR]->(tour:Tournament) RETURN p.name AS playerName, tour.name AS tournamentName

question: What is the average number of times users from each country have watched movies released in 2021? Return the country and the average watch count.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.year = 2021 RETURN u.country AS Country, AVG(w.watchCount) AS AverageWatchCount

question: For each region, what is the average number of visits performed by each person, and what is the average duration (in seconds) of those visits? Return the region name, the average number of visits per person, and the average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH r.name AS region, p, COUNT(v) AS visitCount, AVG(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDurationPerVisit WITH region, AVG(visitCount) AS avgVisitsPerPerson, AVG(avgDurationPerVisit) AS totalAvgDuration RETURN region, avgVisitsPerPerson, totalAvgDuration

question: What is the average amount of money transfers sent to BankAccounts associated with the FinancialInstitute named 'Doyle-Doyle'?
cypher: MATCH (mt:MoneyTransfer)-[:SEND]->(ba:BankAccount)-[:FROM]->(fi:FinancialInstitute {name: 'Doyle-Doyle'}) WITH mt.amount AS transferAmount RETURN avg(transferAmount)

question: Find all teams that participated in the 'Canada 2015' tournament and list the names of players who represented those teams.
cypher: MATCH (t:Tournament {name: 'Canada 2015'})<-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]-(team:Team)<-[:REPRESENTS]-(player:Person) RETURN team.name AS teamName, player.name AS playerName

question: Retrieve the genres of movies that have a 'movieId' greater than 100 and less than 300 and were watched by female users from 'Virginia'.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WHERE m.movieId > 100 AND m.movieId < 300 AND u.gender = 'Female' AND u.state = 'Virginia' RETURN g.name

question: For each region, find the average number of visits performed by persons and the average duration in seconds of those visits. Return the region name, average visit count, and average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH r.name AS regionName, p, v.duration.seconds AS visitDuration WITH regionName, p, COUNT(v) AS visitCount, AVG(visitDuration) AS avgDurationPerVisit WITH regionName, AVG(visitCount) AS avgVisitCount, AVG(avgDurationPerVisit) AS avgVisitDuration RETURN regionName, avgVisitCount, avgVisitDuration

question: For each state, what is the average number of movies watched by users, and what is the total number of distinct IP addresses used by users in that state?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie), (u)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress) WITH u.state AS state, AVG(w.watchCount) AS avgWatchCount, COUNT(DISTINCT ip.address) AS totalIpAddresses RETURN state, avgWatchCount, totalIpAddresses

question: For each country, determine the average visit duration in seconds for visits occurring before '2020-05-01 T 00:00:00 UTC'. Return the country name and the average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country) WHERE v.starttime < datetime('2020-05-01T00:00:00UTC') AND v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH c.name AS countryName, AVG(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDuration RETURN countryName, avgDuration

question: Retrieve the names of all persons who visited a place of type 'Hospital' before being marked as 'Sick', and return the place name and confirmed time of the person.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'Hospital'}) WHERE v.starttime < p.confirmedtime RETURN p.name AS PersonName, pl.name AS PlaceName, p.confirmedtime AS ConfirmedTime

question: For each country, compute the total number of visits and the average duration (in seconds) of visits that occurred after '2020-05-01'. Return the country name, total visits, and average duration, but only for countries with more than 5 visits after the specified date.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country), (p)-[:PERFORMS_VISIT]->(v:Visit) WHERE v.starttime > datetime('2020-05-01T00:00:00.000Z') AND v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH c.name AS countryName, COUNT(v) AS totalVisits, AVG(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDuration WHERE totalVisits > 5 RETURN countryName, totalVisits, avgDuration;

question: For each continent, calculate the average visit duration (in seconds) for visits originating from persons with 'Healthy' health status. Return the continent name and the average duration.
cypher:
MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Healthy'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)
MATCH (pl)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Continent)
WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL
WITH c.name AS continent, v.duration.seconds AS duration
RETURN continent, AVG(duration) AS averageDuration

question: For each type of place, calculate the average visit duration in seconds and the number of persons who performed visits to that type of place. Return the place type, average duration, and the number of persons.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:VISITS]->(pl:Place) WHERE pl.type IS NOT NULL WITH pl.type AS placeType, p, AVG(duration.seconds) AS avgDuration MATCH (p)-[:VISITS]->(pl2:Place) WHERE pl2.type = placeType WITH placeType, avgDuration, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS personCount RETURN placeType, avgDuration, personCount

question: For each region, calculate the total number of visits and the average duration of visits in seconds, only considering visits made by individuals confirmed to be 'Sick' after the visit's start time. Return the region name, total visits, and average duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region) WHERE p.healthstatus = 'Sick' AND v.starttime < p.confirmedtime WITH r.name AS regionName, v.duration.seconds AS visitDuration WHERE visitDuration IS NOT NULL WITH regionName, COUNT(visitDuration) AS totalVisits, AVG(visitDuration) AS averageDuration RETURN regionName, totalVisits, averageDuration

question: For each manufacturer, what is the total number of cases registered and the average age of the patients involved in those cases?
cypher: MATCH (m:Manufacturer)-[:REGISTERED]->(c:Case) RETURN m.manufacturerName AS Manufacturer, COUNT(c) AS TotalCases, AVG(c.age) AS AverageAge

question: For each continent, calculate the average duration (in seconds) of visits made by persons with 'Sick' healthstatus to places of type 'Grocery shop'. Return the continent name and the average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'Grocery shop'}) MATCH (pl)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Continent) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH c.name AS continent, v.duration.seconds AS visitDuration RETURN continent, AVG(visitDuration) AS averageVisitDuration

question: Calculate the average duration (in seconds) of visits for each combination of place type and continent, only considering visits made by persons confirmed to be 'Sick' before '2020-04-20'. Return the place type, continent, and average duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Continent) WHERE p.healthstatus = 'Sick' AND p.confirmedtime < datetime('2020-04-20T00:00:00Z') AND v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH pl.type AS placeType, c.name AS continent, v.duration.seconds AS visitDuration RETURN placeType, continent, AVG(visitDuration) AS averageDuration

question: For each region, compute the average number of visits performed by persons with 'Sick' health status, and the average duration (in seconds) of those visits. Return the region name, average number of visits, and average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH r.name AS region, p, COUNT(v) AS visitCount, AVG(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDuration WITH region, AVG(visitCount) AS avgVisits, AVG(avgDuration) AS overallAvgDuration RETURN region, avgVisits, overallAvgDuration

question: Find cases where the drug 'ZARXIO' is listed as a primary suspect and the patient's age group is 'Elderly'. Return the case's primary ID and the patient's gender.
cypher: MATCH (d:Drug {name: 'ZARXIO'})<-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]-(c:Case)-[:FALLS_UNDER]->(a:AgeGroup {ageGroup: 'Elderly'}) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, c.gender AS patientGender

question: For each type of place, calculate the total number of visits and the average visit duration (in seconds) only for people who have 'Sick' health status. Return the place type, total visits, and average duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH pl.type AS placeType, COUNT(v) AS totalVisits, AVG(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDuration RETURN placeType, totalVisits, avgDuration

question: What is the average movie year for movies watched by users from each state, and what is the total number of users from each state who watched those movies?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH u.state AS state, u, m.year AS movieYear MATCH (u)-[w:WATCHED]->(m) WITH state, AVG(movieYear) AS avgMovieYear, COUNT(DISTINCT u) AS totalUsersPerState RETURN state, avgMovieYear, totalUsersPerState

question: What are the top 3 most frequent reporter occupations associated with cases where 'Blood disorder' was reported as a reaction, along with the count of cases for each occupation?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Blood disorder'}) RETURN c.reporterOccupation AS reporterOccupation, COUNT(c) AS caseCount ORDER BY caseCount DESC LIMIT 3

question: For each manufacturer, what is the total number of cases registered and the average age of the patients involved, grouped by the age group the cases fall under?
cypher: MATCH (m:Manufacturer)-[:REGISTERED]->(c:Case)-[:FALLS_UNDER]->(ag:AgeGroup) RETURN m.manufacturerName AS manufacturerName, ag.ageGroup AS ageGroup, COUNT(c) AS totalCases, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge

question: Retrieve the names of all AccountHolders who have a PhoneNumber provided by 'KPA Tel' and have made purchases using a BankCard with an expiration date of '04-19'.
cypher: MATCH (ah:AccountHolder)-[:HAS_PHONENUMBER]->(pn:PhoneNumber {provider: 'KPA Tel'}) MATCH (p:Purchase)-[:WITH_CARD]->(bc:BankCard {expirationDate: '04-19'}) MATCH (p)-[:WITH_LOGIN]->(l:Login) RETURN ah.fullName

question: Retrieve the names of drugs that are primary suspects in cases where the reporter occupation is 'Hospital' and the patient's gender is female ('F').
cypher: MATCH (c:Case {gender: 'F', reporterOccupation: 'Hospital'})-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug) RETURN d.name AS drugName

question: Find the names of all players who scored goals in matches played in the 'Germany 2011' tournament, along with the minute of the goal.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(t:Tournament {name: 'Germany 2011'}) RETURN p.name AS playerName, sg.minute AS goalMinute

question: Retrieve the names of all genres associated with movies watched by users whose first name is 'Nickolas'.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WHERE u.firstName = 'Nickolas' RETURN g.name AS GenreName

question: For each region, compute the average visit duration (in seconds) for visits starting before '2020-04-20 T 00:00:00 UTC'. Then, return the region name and the average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (v:Visit)-[:LOCATED_AT]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region) WHERE v.starttime < datetime('2020-04-20T00:00:00Z') WITH r.name AS regionName, v.duration.seconds AS visitDurationInSeconds RETURN regionName, avg(visitDurationInSeconds) AS avgVisitDuration

question: Find the names of all players who scored goals in matches played on '2019-06-20' and who are also in a squad that participated in the 'France 2019' tournament.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match {date: date('2019-06-20')}), (p)-[:IN_SQUAD]->(s:Squad)-[:FOR]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'France 2019'}) RETURN p.name AS playerName

question: Retrieve the names of all players who represent the team 'France' and who played in matches before '2004-01-01'. Return the player's name and the match date.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:REPRESENTS]->(t:Team {name: 'France'}), (p)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match) WHERE date(m.date) < date('2004-01-01') RETURN p.name AS playerName, m.date AS matchDate

question: Find all persons who visited a 'Park' type place and a 'Theater' type place, and return their names along with the IDs of the 'Park' and 'Theater' places they visited.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:VISITS]->(park:Place {type: 'Park'}) WITH p, collect(park.id) AS parkIds MATCH (p)-[:VISITS]->(theater:Place {type: 'Theater'}) WITH p, parkIds, collect(theater.id) AS theaterIds RETURN p.name AS PersonName, parkIds, theaterIds

question: For cases reported by 'User Facility', what are the distinct reactions and the count of each reaction?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(r:ReportSource {name: 'User Facility'}), (c)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(re:Reaction) RETURN re.description AS reaction, COUNT(c) AS caseCount

question: For each country, determine the average visit duration (in seconds) for visits performed by persons with 'Sick' health status, grouped by the type of place visited. Return the country name, place type, and average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH c.name AS country, pl.type AS placeType, AVG(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDuration RETURN country, placeType, avgDuration

question: List the first name and last name of users who have watched more than one movie released in 2021.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie {year: 2021}) WITH u, COUNT(m) AS movieCount WHERE movieCount > 1 RETURN u.firstName, u.lastName

question: For each age group, find the number of cases where 'ATORVASTATIN' was a primary suspect and the average age of the patients.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:FALLS_UNDER]->(ag:AgeGroup), (c)-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'ATORVASTATIN'}) RETURN ag.ageGroup AS ageGroup, COUNT(c) AS caseCount, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge

question: For each team that participated in the 'China 2007' tournament, find the average number of players who scored goals in their matches. Return the team name and the average number of goal-scoring players.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'China 2007'}) MATCH (t)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match)<-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]-(p:Person) WITH t, m, COLLECT(DISTINCT p) AS goalScorers RETURN t.name AS teamName, size(goalScorers) as numberOfGoalScorers

question: Calculate the average number of visits per person and the average visit duration in seconds across all persons, grouped by the continent where the places they visited are located. Return the continent name, average visits per person, and average visit duration.
cypher:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Continent)
WITH c.name AS continent, p, pl
WITH continent, p, COUNT(pl) AS visitCount
WITH continent, AVG(visitCount) AS avgVisitsPerPerson
MATCH (per:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pla:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(con:Continent) WHERE con.name = continent and per = p
WITH continent, avgVisitsPerPerson, v.duration.seconds AS durationSeconds
WITH continent, avgVisitsPerPerson, AVG(durationSeconds) AS avgDuration
RETURN continent, avgVisitsPerPerson, avgDuration

question: Find all teams that had a squad participating in the 'France 2019' tournament. Return the team's name and the ID of the squad.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:NAMED]->(s:Squad)-[:FOR]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'France 2019'}) RETURN DISTINCT t.name AS teamName, s.id AS squadId

question: Calculate the average visit duration in seconds for each health status of persons visiting places located in 'Belgium'. Return the health status and the average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country {name: 'Belgium'}) WHERE p.healthstatus IS NOT NULL WITH p.healthstatus AS healthStatus, pl, p MATCH (p)-[v:VISITS]->(pl) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL RETURN healthStatus, AVG(v.duration.seconds) AS averageDuration

question: What is the average age of cases that reported a reaction of 'Weight decreased', grouped by the reporter's occupation?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Weight decreased'}) RETURN c.reporterOccupation AS ReporterOccupation, AVG(c.age) AS AverageAge

question: Find all persons who visited 'Place nr 43' and determine the total duration of their visits. Return the person's name and the total duration in seconds.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {name: 'Place nr 43'}) WITH p, sum(v.duration.seconds) AS totalDuration RETURN p.name AS PersonName, totalDuration;

question: Find all movies that belong to the 'Animation' genre and were watched by users from the 'US'. Return the movie titles and the first names of the users who watched them.
cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre), (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m) WHERE g.name = 'Animation' AND u.country = 'US' RETURN m.title AS MovieTitle, u.firstName AS UserFirstName

question: For each country, compute the total number of visits and the average duration (in seconds) of visits performed by people whose confirmed time is before '2020-04-15'. Return the country name, total visit count, and average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country) WHERE p.confirmedtime < datetime('2020-04-15T00:00:00.000Z') AND v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH c.name AS country, v RETURN country, count(v) AS totalVisits, avg(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDuration

question: What is the average watch count for movies watched by users who use the IP address '79.32.210.82', and how many distinct users watched those movies?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress {address: '79.32.210.82'})-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH AVG(w.watchCount) AS avgWatchCount, COUNT(DISTINCT u) AS distinctUserCount RETURN avgWatchCount, distinctUserCount

question: For each person's health status, determine the average number of visits made to each type of place and the average duration of those visits in seconds. Return the health status, place type, average number of visits, and average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH p.healthstatus AS healthStatus, pl.type AS placeType, v.duration.seconds AS duration MATCH (p)-[v2:VISITS]->(pl2:Place {type:placeType}) WITH healthStatus, placeType, duration, COUNT(v2) AS visitCount RETURN healthStatus, placeType, AVG(visitCount) AS avgVisitCount, AVG(duration) AS avgDuration

question: Find all users who watched movies in the 'Drama' genre and also use the IP address '176.23.137.157'. Return the first name and last name of those users.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) , (u)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress) WHERE g.name = 'Drama' AND ip.address = '176.23.137.157' RETURN u.firstName, u.lastName

question: Find all the players who represented the 'Denmark' team and played in matches during the 'Sweden 1995' tournament. List their names and the stages of the matches they played in.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:REPRESENTS]->(t:Team {name: 'Denmark'}), (p)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'Sweden 1995'}) RETURN p.name AS playerName, m.stage AS matchStage

question: Retrieve the names of all players who were coached by 'Shang Ruihua' and participated in the 'China PR 1991' tournament through their squad.
cypher: MATCH (coach:Person {name: 'Shang Ruihua'})-[:COACH_FOR]->(s:Squad)-[:FOR]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'China PR 1991'}), (p:Person)-[:IN_SQUAD]->(s) RETURN p.name AS playerName

question: What is the average age of cases that have 'Other Serious (Important Medical Event)' as the outcome, grouped by the reporter's occupation?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Other Serious (Important Medical Event)'}) RETURN c.reporterOccupation AS occupation, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge

question: Retrieve the names of all 'Sick' persons who visited a Place after their confirmedtime, and also list the names and types of the places they visited.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place) WHERE v.starttime > p.confirmedtime RETURN p.name AS PersonName, pl.name AS PlaceName, pl.type AS PlaceType

question: For each tournament, determine the average number of teams that participated and the total number of matches played. Return the tournament name, average teams, and total matches.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour:Tournament) WITH tour, COUNT(t) AS teamCount MATCH (m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour) WITH tour, teamCount, COUNT(m) AS totalMatches RETURN tour.name AS tournamentName, AVG(teamCount), totalMatches

question: Retrieve all distinct cases where 'POSACONAZOLE' is a primary suspect and is prescribed in a therapy starting in the year 2020. Return the case's primary ID and the drug's name.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'POSACONAZOLE'}) MATCH (c)-[:RECEIVED]->(t:Therapy)-[p:PRESCRIBED]->(d) WHERE p.startYear = '2020' RETURN DISTINCT c.primaryid AS caseId, d.name AS drugName

question: Find the names of account holders who have a phone number from 'B Tee' and also have a credit card with an expiration date of '06-16'.
cypher: MATCH (ah:AccountHolder)-[:HAS_PHONENUMBER]->(pn:PhoneNumber {provider: 'B Tee'}), (ah)-[:HAS_CREDITCARD]->(cc:CreditCard {expirationDate: '06-16'}) RETURN ah.fullName

question: Retrieve the names of all persons who visited a place of type 'School' and whose confirmed time is before the start time of their visit. Also, return the name of the school they visited.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'School'}) WHERE p.confirmedtime < v.starttime RETURN p.name AS PersonName, pl.name AS SchoolName

question: For each team that participated in the 'Sweden 1995' tournament, find the average number of players who scored goals in each match. Return the team name and the average number of goal-scoring players per match.
cypher:
MATCH (t:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'Sweden 1995'})
MATCH (t)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match)<-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]-(p:Person)
WITH t, m, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS goalScorers
WITH t, AVG(goalScorers) AS avgGoalScorersPerMatch
RETURN t.name AS teamName, avgGoalScorersPerMatch

question: Find users who have watched movies of the 'Adventure' genre and also use the IP address '78.189.244.187'. Return their first name, last name, and email.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre {name: 'Adventure'}), (u)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress {address: '78.189.244.187'}) RETURN u.firstName, u.lastName, u.email

question: Retrieve the first name and last name of users from 'New York' who have watched at least 2 movies with the genre 'Comedy'.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WHERE u.state = 'New York' AND g.name = 'Comedy' WITH u, count(m) AS movieCount WHERE movieCount >= 2 RETURN u.firstName, u.lastName

question: Find cases where the reaction is 'Dysphonia' and the reporter occupation is 'Hospital'. Also, find the drugs that are primary suspects in these cases with 'Oral' route of administration.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Dysphonia'}) WHERE c.reporterOccupation = 'Hospital' MATCH (c)-[rel:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug) WHERE rel.route = 'Oral' RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, d.name AS drugName

question: For each genre, what is the average number of times a movie of that genre has been watched by users?
cypher: MATCH (g:Genre)<-[:HAS]-(m:Movie)<-[w:WATCHED]-(u:User) RETURN g.name AS Genre, AVG(w.watchCount) AS AverageWatchCount

question: For each manufacturer, calculate the number of cases registered and the average age of patients in those cases, only considering manufacturers with more than 1 registered cases.
cypher: MATCH (m:Manufacturer)-[:REGISTERED]->(c:Case) WITH m, COUNT(c) AS caseCount, AVG(c.age) AS avgAge WHERE caseCount > 1 RETURN m.manufacturerName AS manufacturerName, caseCount, avgAge

question: Retrieve all teams that participated in the 'France 2019' tournament, and for each team, list the names of the players who represent them and played in any match of that tournament.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'France 2019'}), (p:Person)-[:REPRESENTS]->(t), (p)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match), (m)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour) RETURN t.name AS teamName, p.name AS playerName

question: For each continent, determine the average number of visits performed by persons and the average duration of these visits in seconds. Then, calculate the correlation between the number of visits and the average duration for each continent. Return the continent name and the correlation value.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:PERFORMS_VISIT]->(v:Visit)-[:LOCATED_AT]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(cont:Continent) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH cont.name AS continent, p, COUNT(v) AS visitCount, AVG(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDuration WITH continent, collect(visitCount) AS visits, collect(avgDuration) AS durations RETURN continent, stDevP(visits) * stDevP(durations) / (stDevP(visits) * stDevP(durations)) AS correlation

question: For each region, determine the percentage of visits made by persons whose health status is 'Sick', compared to the total number of visits to places within that region. Return the region name and the percentage.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region) WITH r, COUNT(v) AS totalVisits, SUM(CASE WHEN p.healthstatus = 'Sick' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sickVisits RETURN r.name AS regionName, toFloat(sickVisits) / totalVisits * 100 AS sickVisitPercentage

question: For each age group, what is the average age of patients in cases where 'TRAMETINIB' was a primary suspect drug and the reaction was 'Neutropenia'?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:FALLS_UNDER]->(ag:AgeGroup), (c)-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'TRAMETINIB'}), (c)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Neutropenia'}) RETURN ag.ageGroup AS ageGroup, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge

question: For each tournament, find the average number of goals scored per match and the total number of matches played. Return the tournament name, average goals per match, and total matches played.
cypher:
MATCH (m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(t:Tournament)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m)
WITH t, m, COUNT(sg) AS goalsPerMatch
WITH t, AVG(goalsPerMatch) AS avgGoalsPerMatch, COUNT(m) AS totalMatches
RETURN t.name AS tournamentName, avgGoalsPerMatch, totalMatches

question: Identify the players who scored goals in matches that took place before '1992-01-01' and were part of the 'Germany 2011' tournament. Return the player's name and the match date.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'Germany 2011'}) WHERE date(m.date) < date('1992-01-01') RETURN p.name AS playerName, m.date AS matchDate

question: For each region, calculate the ratio of visits to 'Restaurant' places to the total number of visits. Return the region name and the visit ratio.
cypher: MATCH (v:Visit)-[:LOCATED_AT]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region) WITH r, pl, v MATCH (v2:Visit)-[:LOCATED_AT]->(pl2:Place {type: 'Restaurant'})-[:PART_OF]->(r) WITH r, COUNT(v) AS totalVisits, COUNT(CASE WHEN pl2.type = 'Restaurant' THEN v2 ELSE NULL END) AS restaurantVisits RETURN r.name AS regionName, toFloat(restaurantVisits) / totalVisits AS visitRatio

question: What are the top 3 most frequent 'route' values used for 'IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT' relationships where the drug name is 'LYRICA'?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[rel:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'LYRICA'}) RETURN rel.route AS route, COUNT(*) AS frequency ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 3

question: Retrieve the names of all persons who visited a 'Grocery shop' and were confirmed to be 'Sick' before their visit, along with the start time of their visit.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'Grocery shop'}) WHERE p.confirmedtime IS NOT NULL AND p.confirmedtime < v.starttime RETURN p.name AS PersonName, v.starttime AS VisitStartTime

question: For each continent, find the average visit duration for visits to places of type 'Mall'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'Mall'}) MATCH (pl)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Continent) WITH c.name AS ContinentName, v.duration.seconds AS VisitDuration RETURN ContinentName, avg(VisitDuration) AS AverageVisitDuration

question: What are the top 3 most frequent reporter occupations associated with cases that resulted in 'Death', along with the count of cases for each occupation?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Death'}) RETURN c.reporterOccupation AS occupation, COUNT(c) AS caseCount ORDER BY caseCount DESC LIMIT 3

question: Find the names of all persons who visited a Place in 'Belgium' and whose visit duration was longer than 24 hours.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place) MATCH (pl)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country {name: 'Belgium'}) WHERE v.duration.seconds > 86400 RETURN p.name AS PersonName

question: For the 'Canada 2015' tournament, identify all the coaches and the teams they coached. Also, list the players who were in the squad that the coach was coaching.
cypher: MATCH (tournament:Tournament {name: 'Canada 2015'})<-[:FOR]-(squad:Squad)<-[:COACH_FOR]-(coach:Person), (squad)<-[:IN_SQUAD]-(player:Person), (player)-[:REPRESENTS]->(team:Team) RETURN coach.name AS coachName, team.name AS teamName, player.name AS playerName

question: How many cases reported by 'Consumer' had a reaction described as 'Adverse drug reaction' and resulted in 'Other Serious (Important Medical Event)' outcome, grouped by the year of the event date?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(rs:ReportSource {name: 'Consumer'}), (c)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Adverse drug reaction'}), (c)-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Other Serious (Important Medical Event)'}) RETURN date(c.eventDate).year AS EventYear, COUNT(c) AS CaseCount

question: What is the average number of distinct genres watched by users who use the IP address '133.198.156.5'?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress {address: '133.198.156.5'})-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WITH u, COLLECT(DISTINCT g.name) AS genres RETURN AVG(SIZE(genres)) AS averageDistinctGenres

question: For each country, calculate the percentage of visits performed by people with 'Sick' healthstatus to places of type 'School'. Return the country name and the percentage of 'Sick' visits to 'School' places.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country) WHERE pl.type = 'School' WITH c.name AS countryName, p, pl MATCH (p)-[:VISITS]->(pl) WHERE p.healthstatus = 'Sick' WITH countryName, count(p) AS sickVisits, count(DISTINCT pl) AS totalPlaces MATCH (per:Person)-[:VISITS]->(pla:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(cou:Country) WHERE pla.type = 'School' AND cou.name = countryName WITH countryName, sickVisits, count(per) as totalVisits RETURN countryName, (toFloat(sickVisits) / totalVisits) * 100 AS sickVisitPercentage

question: For each manufacturer, what is the total number of cases registered where the patient's age was greater than 50?
cypher: MATCH (m:Manufacturer)-[:REGISTERED]->(c:Case) WHERE c.age > 50 RETURN m.manufacturerName AS manufacturer, COUNT(c) AS totalCases

question: Find all AccountHolders who have both a BankAccount and a CreditCard with a balance greater than 2500.0, and return their full names.
cypher: MATCH (ah:AccountHolder)-[:HAS_BANKACCOUNT]->(ba:BankAccount) WHERE ba.balance > 2500.0 MATCH (ah)-[:HAS_CREDITCARD]->(cc:CreditCard) WHERE cc.balance > 2500.0 RETURN ah.fullName

question: What is the average balance of CreditCards held by AccountHolders, and what is the total number of CreditCards linked to these AccountHolders?
cypher: MATCH (ah:AccountHolder)-[:HAS_CREDITCARD]->(cc:CreditCard) WITH AVG(cc.balance) AS averageBalance, COUNT(cc) AS totalCreditCards RETURN averageBalance, totalCreditCards

question: For the tournament 'Germany 2011', find all the teams that participated. For each team, list the players who scored goals in matches within that tournament, along with the minute of the goal. Return the team name, player name, and goal minute.
cypher:
MATCH (tournament:Tournament {name: 'Germany 2011'})<-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]-(team:Team)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(match:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tournament) 
MATCH (player:Person)-[scored:SCORED_GOAL]->(match)
WHERE (player)-[:REPRESENTS]->(team)
RETURN team.name AS teamName, player.name AS playerName, scored.minute AS goalMinute

question: Find cases registered by 'ACADIA PHARMACEUTICALS' where the event date is in April of 2020. Return the case's primary ID and the manufacturer name.
cypher: MATCH (m:Manufacturer {manufacturerName: 'ACADIA PHARMACEUTICALS'})-[:REGISTERED]->(c:Case) WHERE c.eventDate.month = 4 AND c.eventDate.year = 2020 RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, m.manufacturerName AS manufacturerName

question: What is the average number of genres associated with movies watched by users from each country, and what is the total number of users from each country?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WITH u.country AS country, m, COUNT(g) AS genreCount, u WHERE u.country IS NOT NULL WITH country, AVG(genreCount) AS avgGenreCount, COUNT(DISTINCT u) AS userCount RETURN country, avgGenreCount, userCount ORDER BY country

question: Find all users who have watched movies released in the year 2008 and use an IP address ending with '100'. Return the first name of the users and the address.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.year = 2008 WITH u MATCH (u)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress) WHERE ip.address ENDS WITH '100' RETURN u.firstName, ip.address

question: For the tournament 'Germany 2011', calculate the average number of goals scored per match and the total number of matches played. Return the tournament name, average goals per match, and total matches.
cypher: MATCH (m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'Germany 2011'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m) WITH tour, m, COUNT(sg) AS matchGoals WITH tour, SUM(matchGoals) AS totalGoals, COUNT(m) AS totalMatches RETURN tour.name AS tournamentName, CASE WHEN totalMatches > 0 THEN toFloat(totalGoals) / totalMatches ELSE 0 END AS avgGoalsPerMatch, totalMatches;

question: For each continent, calculate the average duration of visits (in seconds) and the total number of distinct persons who performed visits. Return the continent name, average duration, and count of distinct persons.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Continent) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH c.name AS continent, p, v.duration.seconds AS durationInSeconds WITH continent, AVG(durationInSeconds) AS avgDuration, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS distinctPersons RETURN continent, avgDuration, distinctPersons

question: For each genre, what is the average watch count of movies in that genre by users, and what is the total number of users who have watched movies of that genre?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WITH g.name AS genre, u, w.watchCount AS watchCount WITH genre, AVG(watchCount) AS averageWatchCount, COUNT(DISTINCT u) AS totalUsers RETURN genre, averageWatchCount, totalUsers

question: For each person who scored a goal in a match, find the average number of goals they scored per match and the total number of matches they played. Return the person's name, average goals per match, and total matches played.
