cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match) WITH p, COUNT(sg) AS totalGoals, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS totalMatches RETURN p.name AS playerName, toFloat(totalGoals) / totalMatches AS avgGoalsPerMatch, totalMatches

question: For each state, find the average number of movies watched by users using a specific IP address, and the total number of unique IP addresses used by users in that state.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie), (u)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress) WITH u.state AS state, ip.address AS ipAddress, COUNT(m) AS moviesWatched, u WITH state, AVG(moviesWatched) AS avgMoviesWatched, COUNT(DISTINCT ipAddress) AS uniqueIPAddresses RETURN state, avgMoviesWatched, uniqueIPAddresses

question: Retrieve the names of all coaches who coached a squad that participated in the 'USA 1999' tournament, and for each coach, list the IDs of the squads they coached in that tournament.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:COACH_FOR]->(s:Squad)-[:FOR]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'USA 1999'}) RETURN p.name AS coachName, collect(DISTINCT s.id) AS squadIds

question: Find the average watch count for movies watched by users with the last name 'Aartsen'.
cypher: MATCH (u:User {lastName: 'Aartsen'})-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) RETURN avg(w.watchCount) AS AverageWatchCount

question: Find all teams that participated in the 'China PR 1991' tournament and retrieve the names of the players who represented those teams.
cypher: MATCH (t:Tournament {name: 'China PR 1991'})<-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]-(team:Team)<-[:REPRESENTS]-(player:Person) RETURN DISTINCT team.name AS teamName, player.name AS playerName

question: Find all the players who scored goals in matches played in the 'USA 2003' tournament. Return the player's name, the match ID, and the minute the goal was scored.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(t:Tournament {name: 'USA 2003'}) RETURN p.name AS playerName, m.id AS matchId, sg.minute AS goalMinute

question: For each team that played in the 'USA 2003' tournament, find the average number of goals scored per match. Return the team name and the average goals scored.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[r:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'USA 2003'}) WHERE r.score IS NOT NULL WITH t, AVG(r.score) AS avgGoals RETURN t.name AS teamName, avgGoals

question: For each region, compute the average number of visits performed by each person, grouped by their health status. Return the region name, health status, and the average number of visits.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region) WITH r.name AS regionName, p.healthstatus AS healthStatus, p, COUNT(pl) AS numberOfVisits RETURN regionName, healthStatus, AVG(numberOfVisits) AS averageNumberOfVisits

question: What is the average number of users using each IP address, and what is the total number of distinct countries these users are from?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress) WITH ip.address AS ipAddress, COUNT(u) AS userCount, COLLECT(DISTINCT u.country) AS distinctCountries RETURN ipAddress, userCount, SIZE(distinctCountries) AS distinctCountryCount

question: Retrieve the first name and last name of users who have watched more than one movie and use the IP address '72.148.188.249'.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH u, count(m) AS watchedCount WHERE watchedCount > 1 MATCH (u)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress) WHERE ip.address = '72.148.188.249' RETURN u.firstName, u.lastName

question: What are the top 3 most frequent routes of administration for the drug 'ASPIRIN' when it is listed as a primary suspect, along with the count of cases for each route?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[rel:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {name: 'ASPIRIN'}) RETURN rel.route AS route, COUNT(c) AS caseCount ORDER BY caseCount DESC LIMIT 3

question: What are the titles of movies that users from 'US' have watched, and what are the names of the genres associated with those movies?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WHERE u.country = 'US' RETURN m.title, g.name

question: For the 'France 2019' tournament, identify all the teams that participated and retrieve the names of the coaches associated with squads from those teams.
cypher: MATCH (tournament:Tournament {name: 'France 2019'})<-[:FOR]-(squad:Squad)<-[:COACH_FOR]-(person:Person), (team:Team)-[:NAMED]->(squad) RETURN team.name AS teamName, person.name AS coachName

question: For matches played on '1995-06-07', identify all players who scored goals and the teams they represent. Return the player's name, the team's name, and the minute at which the goal was scored.
cypher: MATCH (match:Match {date: date('1995-06-07')})<-[:SCORED_GOAL]-(player:Person)-[:REPRESENTS]->(team:Team) RETURN player.name AS playerName, team.name AS teamName, player-[scored_goal:SCORED_GOAL]->match.id AS goalMinute

question: Identify all tournaments in which both 'England' and 'New Zealand' participated. Return the tournament name and year.
cypher: MATCH (team1:Team {name: 'England'})-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour:Tournament), (team2:Team {name: 'New Zealand'})-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour) RETURN tour.name AS tournamentName, tour.year AS tournamentYear

question: Find all players who scored goals in matches that took place in the 'China 2007' tournament. Return each player's name, the match ID, and the minute they scored the goal.
cypher: MATCH (t:Tournament {name: 'China 2007'})<-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]-(m:Match)<-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]-(p:Person) RETURN p.name AS playerName, m.id AS matchId, sg.minute AS goalMinute

question: What are the titles of the movies that users with the country 'US' and gender 'Female' have watched, and which belong to the 'Romance' genre?
cypher: MATCH (u:User {country: 'US', gender: 'Female'})-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre {name: 'Romance'}) RETURN DISTINCT m.title

question: Retrieve all cases registered by 'GRAVITI PHARMACEUTICALS' where the outcome is 'Disability'. Also, find the age of the patients. Return the case IDs, manufacturer names, outcomes, and patient ages.
cypher: MATCH (m:Manufacturer {manufacturerName: 'GRAVITI PHARMACEUTICALS'})-[:REGISTERED]->(c:Case)-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Disability'}) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, m.manufacturerName AS manufacturerName, o.outcome AS outcome, c.age AS patientAge

question: Calculate the average visit duration (in seconds) for each health status of persons visiting 'Park' type places. Return the health status and the average duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place {type: 'Park'}) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH p.healthstatus AS healthStatus, v.duration.seconds AS duration RETURN healthStatus, AVG(duration) AS avgDuration

question: For each state, what is the average number of movies watched by female users, and what is the total number of female users?
cypher: MATCH (u:User {gender: 'Female'})-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH u.state AS state, u, COUNT(m) AS moviesWatchedPerUser WITH state, AVG(moviesWatchedPerUser) AS averageMoviesWatched, COUNT(DISTINCT u) AS totalFemaleUsers FROM state GROUP BY state RETURN state, averageMoviesWatched, totalFemaleUsers

question: What is the average age of cases prescribed with 'ENOXAPARIN' where the cases fall under the 'Adolescent' age group?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:FALLS_UNDER]->(ag:AgeGroup {ageGroup: 'Adolescent'}), (t:Therapy)-[:PRESCRIBED]->(d:Drug {name: 'ENOXAPARIN'}), (c)-[:RECEIVED]->(t) RETURN AVG(c.age) AS averageAge

question: For each continent, calculate the average number of visits per person and the average visit duration (in seconds). Return the continent name, average visits per person, and average visit duration.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(:Country)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Continent) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH c.name AS continent, p, v.duration.seconds AS visitDuration WITH continent, p, COUNT(v) AS visitCount, AVG(visitDuration) AS avgVisitDurationPerVisit WITH continent, AVG(visitCount) AS avgVisitsPerPerson, AVG(avgVisitDurationPerVisit) AS overallAvgVisitDuration RETURN continent, avgVisitsPerPerson, overallAvgVisitDuration

question: For each country, calculate the average visit duration in seconds for visits occurring before '2020-04-30', and count the number of distinct places visited. Return the country name, average duration, and distinct place count.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(:Region)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Country) WHERE v.starttime < datetime('2020-04-30T00:00:00.000Z') AND v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH c.name AS country, v.duration.seconds AS duration, pl WITH country, AVG(duration) AS avgDuration, COUNT(DISTINCT pl) AS distinctPlaceCount RETURN country, avgDuration, distinctPlaceCount

question: Retrieve the names of all coaches who coached squads that participated in the 'France 2019' tournament, along with the IDs of those squads.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:COACH_FOR]->(s:Squad)-[:FOR]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'France 2019'}) RETURN p.name AS coachName, s.id AS squadId

question: For each manufacturer, what is the average age of the cases they registered, and how many cases did each manufacturer register?
cypher: MATCH (m:Manufacturer)-[:REGISTERED]->(c:Case) RETURN m.manufacturerName AS manufacturer, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge, COUNT(c) AS caseCount

question: What is the average age of cases that reported the reaction 'Hepatocellular carcinoma' and were reported by 'Consumer', grouped by the gender of the case?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Hepatocellular carcinoma'}), (c)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(rs:ReportSource {name: 'Consumer'}) RETURN c.gender AS gender, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge

question: For each team that participated in the 'Canada 2015' tournament, what is the average number of goals scored per match and the total number of matches played?
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'Canada 2015'}) MATCH (t)-[r:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour) WHERE r.score IS NOT NULL WITH t, COUNT(m) AS totalMatches, AVG(r.score) AS avgGoalsPerMatch RETURN t.name AS teamName, totalMatches, avgGoalsPerMatch

question: For each type of place, calculate the average duration (in seconds) of visits made by persons with 'Healthy' health status. Also, find the total number of visits to each place type. Return the place type, average visit duration, and total visit count.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place) WHERE p.healthstatus = 'Healthy' WITH pl.type AS placeType, v.duration.seconds AS visitDuration MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place) WHERE p.healthstatus = 'Healthy' WITH placeType, AVG(visitDuration) AS avgDuration MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place) WHERE p.healthstatus = 'Healthy' AND pl.type = placeType WITH placeType, avgDuration, COUNT(v) AS totalVisits RETURN placeType, avgDuration, totalVisits

question: List the titles of movies that users who use the IP address '159.20.53.180' have watched, along with the watch count for each movie.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress), (u)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WHERE ip.address = '159.20.53.180' RETURN m.title AS MovieTitle, w.watchCount AS WatchCount

question: Retrieve the email addresses of users who use the IP address '70.161.66.15' and have watched a movie released in 2021.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:USES]->(ip:IpAddress), (u)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WHERE ip.address = '70.161.66.15' AND m.year = 2021 RETURN u.email AS UserEmail

question: For each age group, what is the total number of cases where the outcome was 'Hospitalization - Initial or Prolonged'?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:FALLS_UNDER]->(ag:AgeGroup), (c)-[:RESULTED_IN]->(o:Outcome {outcome: 'Hospitalization - Initial or Prolonged'}) RETURN ag.ageGroup AS ageGroup, COUNT(c) AS totalCases

question: What are the titles of movies that users with the last name 'Craker' have watched, and what genres do those movies belong to?
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WHERE u.lastName = 'Craker' RETURN m.title AS MovieTitle, g.name AS GenreName

question: For each person, find the total number of goals they scored and the number of tournaments they played in. Return the person's name, total goals, and number of tournaments.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match)-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]->(tour:Tournament) WITH p, COUNT(sg) AS totalGoals, COLLECT(DISTINCT tour.id) AS tournamentsPlayed RETURN p.name AS playerName, totalGoals, SIZE(tournamentsPlayed) AS numberOfTournaments

question: What is the average age of patients who received therapy and had a reaction described as 'Anal abscess', grouped by the reporter's occupation?
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:RECEIVED]->(t:Therapy), (c)-[:HAS_REACTION]->(r:Reaction {description: 'Anal abscess'}) RETURN c.reporterOccupation AS reporterOccupation, AVG(c.age) AS averageAge

question: For each region, compute the total number of visits and the average visit duration (in seconds) for each health status of persons visiting places within that region.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region) WHERE v.duration.seconds IS NOT NULL WITH r.name AS region, p.healthstatus AS healthStatus, COUNT(v) AS totalVisits, AVG(v.duration.seconds) AS avgDuration RETURN region, healthStatus, totalVisits, avgDuration ORDER BY region, healthStatus

question: Retrieve all cases reported by 'Health Professional' where the patient's age is greater than 55 and they are taking a drug with the primary substance 'ALBUTEROL SULFATE' as a primary suspect. Return the case's primary ID and the drug's name.
cypher: MATCH (c:Case)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(rs:ReportSource {name: 'Health Professional'}) WHERE c.age > 55 MATCH (c)-[:IS_PRIMARY_SUSPECT]->(d:Drug {primarySubstabce: 'ALBUTEROL SULFATE'}) RETURN c.primaryid AS caseId, d.name AS drugName

question: For each team, calculate the number of players who represent the team and the average number of goals scored by those players in all matches. Return the team name, the number of players, and the average goals scored per player.
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)<-[:REPRESENTS]-(p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match) WITH t, p, COUNT(sg) AS goalsPerPlayer WITH t, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS playerCount, AVG(goalsPerPlayer) AS avgGoalsPerPlayer RETURN t.name AS teamName, playerCount, avgGoalsPerPlayer

question: For each genre, what is the average watch count of movies in that genre, considering only users from 'New York'?
cypher: MATCH (u:User {state: 'New York'})-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) RETURN g.name AS Genre, avg(w.watchCount) AS AverageWatchCount

question: For each movie genre, what is the average number of movies watched by users from each country? Return the genre and the average number of movies watched per user per country.
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:HAS]->(g:Genre) WITH g.name AS genre, u.country AS country, m RETURN genre, country, COUNT(m) AS movieCount RETURN genre, country, AVG(movieCount) AS averageMoviesWatched

question: Retrieve the names of all 'Sick' persons who visited a place located in the 'Antwerp' region, along with the names of those places.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person {healthstatus: 'Sick'})-[v:VISITS]->(pl:Place)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Region {name: 'Antwerp'}) RETURN p.name AS PersonName, pl.name AS PlaceName;
